title: Part-Time Bookkeeper (QuickBooks) – 2 Hours/Week or As Needed
description:
We are looking for a reliable, trustworthy, and detail-oriented Virtual Bookkeeper to help maintain accurate financial records. This is a remote, part-time position requiring approximately 2 hours per week, with occasional additional hours as needed.



Responsibilities

-Record and allocate daily financial transactions in QuickBooks

-Perform bank and credit card reconciliations

-Ensure transactions are categorized correctly according to U.S. accounting standards

-Review accounts for accuracy and resolve discrepancies

-Maintain organized and accurate financial records

-Provide basic financial reports when requested



Requirements

-Strong proficiency in QuickBooks

-Solid understanding of U.S. bookkeeping and accounting standards

-Experience with transaction allocation and reconciliations

-High attention to detail and strong organizational skills

-Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

-Prior bookkeeping or accounting experience required

-Must be trustworthy and able to handle confidential financial information



Work Schedule

-Approximately 2 hours per week

-Can work during Mountain Standard Time

-Additional hours may be available as needed



Position Type

-Part-Time



To Apply:



Please answer the questions listed below. When submitting your response, make sure to include the following in the subject line: Reconciliation - [Your Date of Birth in MM/DD/YYYY Format]



-Are you OK with $5 starting rate?

-Have you handled US accounts before?

-How many years of experience do you have using QuickBooks?

-Describe your process for reconciling a bank account in QuickBooks.

-If you notice a transaction in the books that you are unsure how to categorize, what steps would you take before recording it?

-If your QuickBooks balance does not match the bank statement during reconciliation, what steps would you take to identify and fix the discrepancy?

title: Appointment Setter/ Sales Manager
description:
We’re expanding and hiring remote appointment setters.



This is a high-performance, call-heavy role that requires full commitment and consistency. It’s not suited for someone seeking a relaxed schedule or strong work-life balance.



We’re looking for individuals who are driven, disciplined, and ready to put in the hard work to succeed.



Who We’re Looking For:

• Fluent English with a clear and neutral accent

• Hungry for sales and ready to grind

• Disciplined, reliable, and performance-driven

• Coachable and willing to learn fast

• Comfortable with high daily outreach volume

• Experience with Clay, Instantly, or HeyReach is a big plus

• Previous experience as a setter increases your chances



What You’ll Do:

• Engage and reach out to up to 200 people per day with personalized messages

• Make up to 300 call attempts per day (scripts and support provided)

• Qualify prospects and book high-quality sales appointments

• Follow up with leads and re-engage cold prospects

• Work EU and North America business hours (full-time position)

• Follow a proven outreach playbook and track daily performance metrics



What You Get:

• Good salary

• 100% remote - work from anywhere

• Full access to our $30K sales training library

• 1:1 mentorship and daily support

• Opportunity to grow

• Be part of a fast-growing international team



To apply:



1. Create a Miro Mind Map

Show everything you’ve done so far on Miro board. Include tools you can work with, clear numbers, KPIs, and results.



2. Create a 3-Month Plan

Define your daily actions, outreach volume, and channels.



3. Loom Video (max 7 min)

Explain both in a clear, structured way.

title: Meta Ads Manager (Aesthetic Clinics & Med Spas) – Performance Focused
description:
We’re looking for an experienced Meta Ads Manager to join our growing team at GROM Digital.



We specialise in helping aesthetic clinics and medical spas generate predictable patient bookings through structured acquisition systems.



This is not a beginner role.



We’re looking for someone who has real experience running ads specifically for aesthetic clinics or med spas, and understands what actually drives results in this industry.



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will be responsible for managing paid advertising campaigns for our clients, as well as supporting landing pages, creatives, and performance optimisation.



You’ll be working closely with our founders and team to deliver measurable results across multiple client accounts.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Manage and optimise Meta 
 & Instagram) ad campaigns

Launch and test new ad creatives and angles

Analyse performance and improve CPL, bookings, and ROI

Build and optimise landing pages (GoHighLevel or similar)

Work with video/image content to create ad creatives

Source or repurpose creatives from existing content

Understand clinic offers and structure campaigns accordingly

Report on performance and suggest improvements



REQUIREMENTS (IMPORTANT)



You MUST have:



Experience running ads for aesthetic clinics or medical spas

Proven ability to generate leads or bookings (not just clicks)

Experience building or editing landing pages / funnels

Ability to create or brief ad creatives from raw content

Strong understanding of Meta Ads Manager

Good written and spoken English



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR:

Beginners or course-only experience

Generalist marketers with no clinic experience

Anyone who hasn’t worked on real ad accounts

People who can’t show past results



IDEAL CANDIDATE

Has worked with Botox, fillers, skin clinics, or similar

Understands patient psychology and offers

Knows how to improve lead quality (not just volume)

Can take ownership of accounts and performance



SUCCESS IN THIS ROLE LOOKS LIKE:

Consistent lead flow for clients

Improved cost per lead and booking rates

Strong communication and proactive ideas

Ability to manage multiple client accounts



COMPENSATION

Base: $800/month

Performance bonuses available based on results

Opportunity to grow into senior role as we scale



HOW TO APPLY



Please include:



Examples of campaigns you’ve run (especially clinics)

Results you’ve achieved (CPL, leads, bookings etc.)

Platforms/tools you’ve used

A short video (1–2 mins) explaining your experience



We’re building a high-performance team and looking for someone who wants to grow with us long term.



If that’s you, apply below.

description:
About Us



Crown Realty Experts is a professional U.S.-based real estate company providing residential and commercial property management services. We are seeking an experienced, detail-oriented Property Manager Assistant who is highly familiar with online property management software and capable of handling a fast-paced, high-volume workload with precision.



This position requires excellent organizational skills, strong communication, and the ability to work independently while following very clear instructions. Applicants must also have prior experience in lease and tenant management.

title: Video Editor – Meta Ads for eCommerce Brand
description:
We’re looking for a full-time video editor who understands what it truly takes to create high-converting video ads and has prior experience working with other eCommerce brands.



We run a dropshipping brand selling in Sweden, Norway, Finland and Denmark. The majority of our ad creatives are for Meta 
 & Instagram). If you’ve edited videos before just to make them look “nice,” this is not the job for you.



We need someone who knows how to:

- Hook the viewer in the first 3 seconds

- Use the right messaging, pacing, and visuals to keep attention

- Edit based on market awareness and sophistication

- Understand what makes a product desirable and show it clearly

- Focus on conversion, not just aesthetics



You must also be:

- Comfortable editing in Swedish, Norwegian, Danish and Finnish audio (you don’t need to speak the languages, but you must be fine working with those languages in audio/text). We will provide english instructions and translations every time to make the process easy for you.

- Available to work 8 hours a day, 6 days a week – this is a serious full-time job, not a side hustle

- Organized, focused, and reliable – we’re building a real team.

- Fast at turning around content while maintaining high standards



We will give you clear briefs, proven ad angles, and access to content. But we expect you to bring your editing brain to the table – understanding what makes a video work, how to improve performance, and how to make our ads stand out.



To Apply:

Please send us:

The names of eCommerce brands you’ve previously worked with.

A link to your portfolio showcasing your best ad editing work.

A message telling us why you're a good fit for this specific role.

If we receive a Ai response your instantly ignored.

Links to your best ad editing work (ideally Meta ads for past e-commerce brands you worked with)

And when you can start.



This is a key position. If you understand editing for performance, not just style, and you're ready to commit full-time to a brand that values speed, clarity, and results — apply now.

title: Instagram Virtual Assistant | Multiple Accounts | Full-Time Remote
description:
We are an established, profitable agency hiring a full-time Instagram Account Manager to handle 6 to 10+ accounts daily. We pay in USDT, we have real structure, and we are building a team around the right people.



If you've been looking for a role where your work actually matters, where you're trusted with real responsibility, where you get paid properly and treated like a professional, keep reading.



This Is Not a Generic VA Role



We don't need someone to do random tasks. We need someone who can own multiple Instagram accounts, run them cleanly every day, and hold themselves to a high standard without being micromanaged.



We have SOPs. We have systems. We communicate well. You won't be left guessing what to do. But we expect you to show up, execute, and care about the quality of your work the same way we care about ours.



What Your Day Actually Looks Like



You log in and check your accounts. You review what needs to be posted, confirm the content matches the right account, format, and caption style. You post on schedule. You run through each account's engagement playbook: commenting, liking, story viewing, DM conversations. You check metrics and note anything that looks off. You log everything in your tracking sheet. You edit a few raw clips into Reels or stories. At the end of your shift, you send a clean report of what was done and what needs attention.



Then you do it again tomorrow. And the day after that. The people who thrive here are the ones who find satisfaction in doing consistent, high-quality work, not people who get bored after a week.



Your Responsibilities



· Manage 6 to 10+ Instagram accounts daily, each with its own branding, voice, and schedule

· Post the right content at the right time in the right format (Reels, stories, carousels, feed)

· Handle daily engagement: commenting, liking, story viewing, follow/unfollow based on each account's instructions

· Manage DMs across accounts, including scripted conversations that drive engagement

· Edit raw content into polished Instagram posts using CapCut, Canva, or similar

· Research competitors and trends to support content strategy

· Track all daily actions in Google Sheets

· Monitor performance metrics, flag issues, and suggest improvements

· Understand Instagram's content policies and know how to maximize reach without getting flagged

· Keep all account information, content, and business details strictly confidential



What You Need



· A solid computer or laptop (8GB+ RAM, SSD preferred). Everything runs from your computer. If your machine is slow, your work will be slow.

· Reliable internet (50Mbps+ download). If your connection drops regularly, this won't work.

· 6 to 8 hours per day, 5 to 6 days per week. We're flexible on timezone as long as your schedule is consistent and overlaps at least partially with US hours.

· Strong written English. You'll write captions, handle DMs, and send daily reports. Quality matters.

· Ability to follow detailed instructions the same way, every time, across multiple accounts.

· Comfort working with content that may not be suitable for all audiences. We'll discuss this further in the application.

· Real organizational skills. Managing 5+ accounts means 5+ sets of rules, 5+ posting schedules, 5+ brand voices. If that sounds overwhelming, this isn't the role. If it sounds like a challenge you'd enjoy, keep going.



What We'd Love to See (Not Required, But It Helps)



· Experience managing 3+ Instagram accounts at the same time

· Caption writing and content posting experience

· DM management experience

· Short-form video editing (CapCut, Canva, Premiere)

· Competitor research and trend analysis

· Google Sheets reporting (tracking, formulas, daily logs)

· Understanding of how the Instagram algorithm works

· Experience working with accounts in niche or sensitive categories



What We Pay



$500 to $1,500+ USD per month, depending on your experience and how many accounts you can handle well. Raises and bonuses are performance-based and built into the role. We don't cap what you can earn. If you produce results, your compensation grows.



We are not looking for the cheapest hire. We are looking for the best one.



Where This Can Go



This isn't a dead-end position. The right person will take on more accounts, earn more, and eventually lead a team of account managers. That growth path is real. It's earned through performance, consistency, and trust, but it's there for anyone who wants it.



Several people on our current team started where you'd be starting. They stayed because the work is stable, the pay is fair, and the growth is real.



Who Should NOT Apply



· You're not available 6 to 8 hours a day, 5 to 7 days a week

· Your computer is old, slow, or unreliable

· Your internet drops regularly

· You're careless with details or forget things easily

· You want something casual, temporary, or low-responsibility

· You can't keep business information confidential



How to Apply



Fill out our application form carefully. We read every answer, and how you fill out this form tells us a lot about how you'd do the job.







If your application is vague, rushed, or incomplete, we won't move forward. If it's thoughtful and shows you actually read this post, you'll hear from us.

title: Creator Operations Assistant – Research, Systems & Analytics
description:
Creator Operations Assistant – Research, Systems & Analytics (AI-Driven)

Remote | Part-Time to Start | Long-Term Opportunity



About the Role

We are looking for a highly organized, analytical, and proactive Operations Assistant to support a fast-growing creator business in the TikTok Shop ecosystem.

Your role is to save the creator time and mental energy by managing:

• product research

• sample tracking

• content preparation

• performance analysis

So the creator can focus on filming and execution only.

This role is execution-heavy and systems-driven, not customer support or basic admin work.



IMPORTANT: How to Apply

To apply, please complete the Skills Assessment Form below:

???? 

The assessment takes 15–20 minutes.

Applications submitted without completing the form will not be considered.

To confirm that you read this entire job description, include the phrase:

“Creator Systems”

in the first question of the form.



Core Responsibilities

1. Sample Fulfillment & Tracking

You will manage a master tracking system (Google Sheets) for all product samples and collaborations.

You will track:

• product name

• brand

• deadline

• shipping status (in transit / received)

• filming status

• key product features and benefits

You will also organize samples into filming groups such as:

• makeup

• skincare

• clothing

• home products

Your goal is to ensure:

? no deadlines are missed

? filming is organized and efficient

? everything is clearly tracked and visible



2. Content Research for Samples

For each product, you will:

• find top-performing TikTok videos

• identify hooks and content angles

• extract and summarize scripts

• organize everything into a Google Sheet

This allows the creator to quickly see what works before filming.



3. Product Research (Ongoing)

You will research new products for future content opportunities.

This includes:

• identifying trending products

• finding high-converting videos

• extracting patterns from successful content

We will provide:

? research tools

? login access

? training on what metrics to look for

Your job is to analyze and organize insights clearly and quickly.



4. Competitive Research

When a product has little content available, you will:

• research similar products

• analyze broader categories (ex: skincare)

• analyze specific niches (ex: eye patches)

• identify winning hooks and video styles



5. Performance Tracking & Analysis

Each week, you will analyze performance and identify:

• top revenue-generating videos

• top-performing products

• best-performing hooks and scripts

You will maintain a dashboard showing:

• weekly winners

• monthly winners

• top products

• content patterns that convert

Your goal is to help the creator:

???? double down on what is already working



Systems You Will Manage

You will maintain three core systems:

1?? Sample Tracker

Deadlines, shipments, and fulfillment status

2?? Research Library

Top-performing videos, hooks, and scripts

3?? Performance Dashboard

Top revenue-generating content and trends



AI-Assisted Workflows (Required)

This role requires someone who knows how to use AI tools (ChatGPT or similar) to work faster and smarter.

Examples include:

• summarizing scripts

• extracting hooks

• organizing research

• identifying patterns

• improving workflow efficiency

We are looking for someone who uses AI as a tool for leverage, not just basic usage.



Required Skills

We are looking for someone who is:

• extremely organized

• detail-oriented

• analytical

• comfortable with spreadsheets

• strong written English communicator

• able to manage multiple moving parts

• comfortable using AI tools

• fast and efficient with research



Preferred Experience

Bonus if you have experience with:

• TikTok Shop

• affiliate marketing

• content research

• social media analytics

• influencer content



Who This Role Is Perfect For

Someone who:

• loves systems and organization

• enjoys research and data

• is proactive and reliable

• wants long-term growth

• enjoys improving processes



Who This Role Is NOT For

• beginners

• people who need constant direction



Compensation

Opportunity for:

description:
I'm starting a content business on Fiverr and need someone to manage the day-to-day operations of my account. 



I'm looking for a reliable, organized person who can take over building the business getting the gigs. 



This is a LONG-TERM part-time role (2-3 hours/day). I'm not looking for someone for 1-2 weeks — I want someone who will stay for months.



What You'll Do Every Day (2-3 hours):



1. Respond to Buyer Messages (30 min)

Reply to all Fiverr messages within 15-20 minutes during your shift

Answer questions about services, pricing, and delivery times

Negotiate custom orders with buyers

Send buyers to the right gig based on what they need



2. Send Offers on Fiverr "Find Work" (45 min)

Check the buyer briefs section daily

Send up to 10 personalized offers per day





You'll get a template/guide for how to write offers — you customize each one based on the buyer's brief

Track which offers get responses in a Google Sheet



3. Manage Orders (45 min)

Accept new orders and confirm details with buyers

Track delivery deadlines

Coordinate with me (the writer) on what's due when

Request delivery extensions if needed (before deadline!)

Follow up with buyers after delivery to ask for reviews



4. Optimize Gigs (30 min)

Monitor gig stats (impressions, clicks, orders) and log in a spreadsheet

Suggest improvements to titles/descriptions based on what's working

Post on Reddit,
 groups, and LinkedIn to drive traffic to gigs (scripts and guidance provided)



5. Weekly Reports (Sunday)

Send me a simple summary: messages handled, offers sent, orders received, revenue, any issues





What I'll Provide:

Training document with everything you need to know

Message templates for common buyer questions

Offer templates for Find Work

A Google Sheet to track everything

Access to the Fiverr account (you log in as me)



Requirements:

Fluent English — you'll be talking to native English speakers daily

Reliable internet and a computer

Available to check messages during your shift — buyers expect fast replies

Honest and detail-oriented — I need someone I can trust

Willing to learn — I'll train you on everything Fiverr-specific

Google Sheets experience — basic is fine

No experience with Fiverr needed — I'll teach you everything





Nice to Have (Not Required):

Previous experience as a VA

Experience with social media (LinkedIn, Reddit,
 groups)

Basic knowledge of SEO or content writing

Graphic design skills (for gig thumbnails)

What I'm Looking For in a Person:

You show up on time, every day

You don't disappear for hours without notice

You ask questions when you're not sure

You're proactive — if you see something that could be improved, you tell me





100/month

Paid monthly via PayPal or Wise

13th month bonus after 12 months





Performance bonus: extra $50/month if the account hits revenue targets

Small raises every 6 months based on performance



Hours:

2-3 hours/day, Monday-Saturday (you choose the hours)

You must check messages at least 2x during your shift



Flexible schedule — as long as the work gets done

title: Short Form Video Editor & Social Media Manager — UK Property Development
description:
About the role:



I am a UK based property developer documenting my journey building a property portfolio and working on real development projects. I need a skilled video editor and social media manager to take my raw iPhone footage and turn it into engaging short form reels posted consistently across Instagram, TikTok and YouTube Shorts.



Your main responsibilities:



Editing raw iPhone footage into short form reels and TikTok videos 30-90 seconds long. Adding captions, text overlays, transitions and music. Creating strong hooks in the first 3 seconds of every video. Writing captions and hashtags for each post. Scheduling and posting content daily. Organising raw footage in our shared Google Drive. Repurposing longer videos into multiple short clips. Telling me what footage you need so I just film and upload.



What I need from you:



Proven experience editing short form reels and TikTok content. Strong understanding of what performs well on Instagram and TikTok in 2025. Ability to work independently with minimal supervision. Good written English for captions. Reliable, consistent and communicative. Quick turnaround — ideally 24-48 hours per video.



The workflow:



I film on iPhone 16 Pro Max and upload to shared Google Drive organised by video number. You download, edit, caption, schedule and post. Simple and straightforward. Your job is to make my content look professional and grow my audience.



Please include in your application:



Examples of reels or TikTok videos you have edited. Your hourly rate. Your availability and turnaround time per video. Why you would be good for this role.



Hours: Flexible — approximately 10-15 hours per week to start with potential to grow.



Rate: Please state your expected hourly rate.



Niche: Property development and investment — UK market.

title: Operations & Accounts Virtual Assistant
description:
Virtual Assistant (Construction Admin & Accounts) – Remote

We’re looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to become the backbone of our operations at Tim Halliday Renovations, a growing bathroom renovation company based in Australia.

This is a long-term role for the right person who wants to grow with the business and take ownership of key admin and accounts functions.

________________________________________

 About Us

At Tim Halliday Renovations, we specialise in high-quality bathroom renovations. We pride ourselves on organisation, attention to detail, and delivering a smooth experience for our clients.

We’re building strong internal systems — and we need someone who can help keep everything running accurately and efficiently behind the scenes.

________________________________________

 Role Details

• Remote (OnlineJobs.ph applicants preferred) 

• Starting at 6 hours per week (across 2 days) 

• Potential to increase hours over time 

• Must be available 9:00am – 4:00pm (Australian EST) 

________________________________________

 Application Instructions (IMPORTANT)

To be considered:

1. Apply via OnlineJobs.ph 

2. Submit a video (max 3 minutes) covering: 

o A short introduction about yourself 

o Your professional experience (especially Xero, payroll, admin) 

o Why you’re a good fit for this role 

3. Follow all instructions carefully (this role requires high attention to detail) 

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

Payroll & Accounts

• Process weekly payroll (after approval) 

• Issue payslips via Xero 

• Manage accounts inbox: 

o Review and pay invoices 

o Allocate expenses to correct jobs 

________________________________________

Xero Management

• Reconcile transactions 

• Match payments accurately 

• Flag uncertain items for review 

• Update client spreadsheet with invoices & payments 

________________________________________

Client & Job Management

• Add new clients into Connect Teams 

• Maintain accurate client records: 

o Contact details 

o Addresses 

o Phone numbers 

• Create job chats and assign tea
mbers 

________________________________________

Asset & Compliance Tracking

• Track vehicles, trailers, and equipment 

• Monitor registrations, insurance policies, and renewals 

• Ensure nothing is missed 

________________________________________

Lead Tracking & Data

• Review calendars and call logs 

• Record lead sources (Calendly, referrals, etc.) 

• Maintain accurate marketing data 

________________________________________

Back Costing & Materials Tracking

• Review supplier invoices  

• Allocate costs to jobs 

• Maintain back-costing spreadsheet 

• Track total job costs 

________________________________________

Requirements

• Experience with Xero & payroll 

• Strong Excel skills 

• Fluent English (written & spoken) 

• Knowledge of Australian tax 

• High level of accuracy and attention to detail 

• Reliable, trustworthy, strong work ethic 

• Experience with Connect Teams (preferred, not essential) 

________________________________________

 What We’re Looking For

Someone who:

• Takes ownership and responsibility 

• Is highly organised and detail-focused 

• Communicates clearly and proactively 

• Wants a long-term role, not just short-term work 

• Can become a key part of how our business operates 

________________________________________

 Screening Questions (Include in Your Application)

Please answer the following:

1. Describe your experience with Xero and payroll processing 

2. How do you ensure accuracy when working with financial data? 

3. What would you do if you found a mistake or discrepancy in accounts? 

4. Have you worked with job costing or allocating expenses to projects before? Explain briefly.

title: Backend Manager fashion dropship (high scale)
description:
THIS JOB STARS AS PART TIME AND CAN GROW INTO PART TIME AS WE SCALE. ABSOLUTE EXCELLENCE IS NEEDED FOR THIS POSITION - ONLY A-PLAYERS. PLEASE DON'T REPLY TO THIS IF U ARE NOT AN A-PLAYER AND DO NOT MEET THE REQUIREMENTS. IF U THINK U ARE A PERFECT FIT, SEND A MESSAGE TO
ON WHATSAPP WITH A SHORT APPLICATION. 



???? Backend Manager / Right-Hand Operator — Fashion E-Commerce (Full-Time, Remote)

Position: Full-Time Backend Manager (Right Hand)

Hours: 40 hours/week (weekdays + weekends)

Starting Pay: $5.00/hour + performance bonuses

Pay Schedule: Bi-weekly

Industry: Fashion E-Commerce / Dropshipping



About Us

We run a high-volume fashion dropshipping operation targeting the Australian market, with suppliers based in Asia. We're currently processing 50+ orders per day and generating serious daily revenue — and we're scaling. Our model moves fast, pivots when needed, and rewards sharp thinking.

We're not looking for someone to fill a seat. We're looking for an A-player — someone who takes genuine ownership, sees problems before they become fires, and helps this business grow beyond where it is today. If that's not you, this isn't for you.



The Role

You will be my right hand — the person who keeps the backend of this business running flawlessly so I can focus entirely on the frontend. You're not just executing tasks; you're thinking ahead, protecting margins, managing relationships, and setting the standard for everyone else on the team.

This is a role for someone who works because they want to — not because they were asked to.



What You'll Be Responsible For



Order Management: Review all orders daily for address issues, sizing problems, and data errors before they cause refunds, disputes, or chargebacks.

Supplier Communication: Maintain tight, professional daily contact with our Asia-based supplier. Ensure all orders are fulfilled on time, every time. Request and verify invoices daily.

Quality Control: Request and review quality checks for fashion products to keep our refund and chargeback rates as low as possible. You understand that a low chargeback and refund rate is a key KPI — and you take it personally.

Customer Service Oversight: Review the customer service team's work once per day. Check response times, tone, and accuracy. Flag anything that's off and correct it immediately.

SOP Adherence: Follow our Standard Operating Procedures without deviation. You don't take shortcuts.

Supply Chain Management: Keep a firm grip on the full supply chain — from order placement to delivery. Identify and resolve bottlenecks proactively.

Chargeback & Dispute Management: Use Disputifier to fight chargebacks and win. You know the process, you know the evidence required, and you don't let illegitimate disputes slide.

Staff Management & Hiring: Manage current tea
mbers, hold them accountable, and recognize when performance is slipping. When growth demands it — or when someone is clearly coasting — you identify the need for a new hire and take initiative. You understand which roles a scaling fashion dropship business needs: ads listers, product listers, social media managers, supply chain managers, customer service reps, invoice checkers, and more — and you know when to bring them in.

Product Listings & Size Charts: Experience with product listings and Kiwi size charts is required.

Reporting & Admin: Maintain clean, accurate Excel sheets for tracking performance, invoices, orders, and team output.

AI-Assisted Workflows: Actively use ChatGPT, Gemini, or other AI tools to improve efficiency and quality of work.

Initial CS Support: In the early stages, you'll also jump in on customer service
s when needed — no task is beneath you.





What We Need From You



Minimum 5 years of experience as a Backend Manager

Minimum 2 years of experience specifically with fashion dropshipping stores

Proven experience managing high-volume order stores (50+ orders/day)

Deep understanding of the dropshipping business model — including market switches, rebuilding phases, and scaling periods

Proficiency with: Shopify, Gmail, Excel, Disputifier

Experience with Kiwi size charts and fashion-specific quality control

Experience with supply chain management in a fashion context

Fluent in written and spoken English — no exceptions

Must be proficient with AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini, or similar)

Comfortable working across Australian and Asian time zones

Available 40 hours per week, including weekends

Currently not employed elsewhere — this is a strict requirement. This role demands full focus and availability. If you are working another job, please do not apply.





Who You Are



You are organized, fast, and thorough — mistakes cost real money here and you know it

You are stress-resistant — when volume spikes or something breaks, you don't panic, you solve

You are proactive — you spot issues before they're issues, and you bring solutions, not just problems

You push me to be better — you'll call out what needs to improve and back it up with data or reasoning

You bring fresh ideas and real improvements to the operation

You are a fast learner who picks up new tools, workflows, and tasks without being hand-held

You work on your own initiative — not waiting to be asked

You understand that in this business, every error costs money and every good decision earns it





Compensation



Starting rate: $5.00/hour

Performance bonuses tied to chargeback and refund rate benchmarks — stay below the targets, earn more

Salary increases as you grow with the business and demonstrate consistent results

Payment: Bi-weekly (alternative arrangements can be discussed if needed)





A Note on Fit

We're doing $7,000/day in revenue. This isn't a hobby operation. Every piece of this role matters — the invoices, the quality checks, the disputes, the team management, the supplier calls. If you're the person who quietly makes everything run better, who doesn't need to be micromanaged, and who takes real pride in a clean, efficient backend — you'll thrive here.

Somewhere in this job post is a small test. If you read every single word carefully — which any serious candidate should — you will know exactly how to begin your application (With the word ''Strawberry''). We use this to filter out mass-applicants from people who actually mean business.



How to Apply

Send your application with:



A brief introduction about yourself and your background

Specific examples of fashion dropshipping stores you've managed

Your experience with Disputifier, chargebacks, and quality control

Your current availability and timezone

Any tools, systems, or improvements you've introduced at previous roles



If you do not meet all of the requirements listed above, please do not apply.

We look forward to hearing from the right person.

title: Content Creator, Video Editor & Social Media Manager
description:
**About us:**



Modern Menopause is a Canadian virtual healthcare platform focused on evidence-based menopause care. We support women through perimenopause, menopause, and post-menopause with personalized treatment options, including hormone replacement therapy (HRT), non-hormonal therapies, and virtual care from licensed nurse practitioners and physicians.



We are building a trusted, modern brand in women’s health and are looking for a creative, detail-oriented **Content Creator/Video Editor & Social Media Manager** to help bring that vision to life across digital channels.



**Role Overview:**



We’re looking for someone who can blend **content creation, video editing, graphic design, and social media execution** into one cohesive role.



You will create educational and brand-forward content focused on menopause, perimenopause, HRT, symptoms, treatment options, and women’s health in midlife. You should be comfortable working with medically relevant topics, translating clinical information into clear consumer-facing content, and ensuring content remains accurate, credible, and easy to understand. This includes designing static graphics, editing short-form videos, working with in-house footage, adding B-roll and branded visual elements, and posting or scheduling content across our social channels.



This is a freelance role with the potential to grow into a longer-term part-time or full-time opportunity based on fit and business needs. The role may also expand to support other health-related brands under our umbrella.



**What You’ll Do:**



- Create social media content for Modern Menopause across Instagram,
, LinkedIn, YouTube, and other relevant platforms

- Design static content such as carousel posts, educational graphics, quote posts, infographics, and promotional assets

- Edit short-form video content for social media using in-house footage, captions, transitions, B-roll, and other enhancements

- Turn clinical or educational information into content that is clear, engaging, and aligned with the brand

- Write or adapt captions and on-screen copy for social posts and video content

- Schedule and publish content based on a content calendar

- Maintain visual consistency across channels and ensure content aligns with our tone, messaging, and brand identity

- Collaborate with our team to brainstorm new content ideas, campaigns, and educational series

- Repurpose long-form or existing content into social-first formats

- Support content creation for other wellness or health brands under the company when needed



**What We’re Looking For:**



- Experience in **content creation, social media management, graphic design, and video editing**

- Strong portfolio showing social media content, branded design work, and short-form video editing

- Ability to create content and visuals that feels modern, polished, and credible in a healthcare or wellness setting

- Experience editing Instagram Reels, short-form YouTube videos, and other vertical video formats

- Proficiency in tools such as **Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, Premiere Pro, CapCut, Final Cut Pro**, or similar platforms

- Strong understanding of social media best practices, including platform-specific formatting and trends

- Strong visual taste and ability to create clean, elevated, on-brand assets

- Excellent written English and attention to detail

- Comfortable taking clinical or health-related input and translating it into accessible content

- Strong organization and ability to work independently in a remote environment

title: Tech-Savvy Online Business Manager (OBM)|Exec VA
description:
She Who Scales is a coaching business helping female entrepreneurs step into leadership, visibility, and scalable income through identity work, messaging, and business systems.



We are hiring a tech-savvy, execution-focused Online Business Manager (OBM) who can take ideas, offers, and frameworks and turn them into fully built, functional backend systems that generate revenue.



This role is for someone who is both strategic enough to see the big picture and hands-on enough to build inside platforms like GoHighLevel and Kajabi.



Tech-Savvy Online Business Manager (OBM) – She Who Scales

Overview



She Who Scales is a coaching business helping female entrepreneurs step into leadership, visibility, and scalable income through identity work, messaging, and business systems.



We are hiring a tech-savvy, execution-focused Online Business Manager (OBM) who can take ideas, offers, and frameworks and turn them into fully built, functional backend systems that generate revenue.



This role is for someone who is both strategic enough to see the big picture and hands-on enough to build inside platforms like GoHighLevel and Kajabi.



The Role



You will act as the operational backbone of the business.



The founder brings vision, content, and direction.

You translate that into systems, funnels, and launches that are executed quickly and efficiently.



You are not here to wait for step-by-step instructions. You are here to take ownership, problem-solve, and build.



Core Responsibilities:



1. Funnel & Backend Build (Primary Focus)

Build and manage funnels inside GoHighLevel, Kajabi, or similar platforms

Set up landing pages, checkout flows, and product delivery

Connect systems end-to-end (payments,
s, automations)

Build and implement ManyChat flows for lead generation and sales

Ensure all systems are functional, tested, and optimized



2. Offer Implementation

Take raw offers, drafts, and frameworks and structure them into clear products

Upload and organize courses, programs, and digital products

Build onboarding flows and client access systems

Turn ideas into live, sellable assets



3. Project & Launch Execution

Turn ideas into clear execution plans with timelines and deliverables

Lead launches of offers, funnels, and products

Ensure all moving parts are completed on time

Identify blockers and solve them quickly



4. Systems & Operations

Build and maintain backend systems (Notion, Google Drive, CRM tools)

Create SOPs for repeatable processes

Streamline workflows across content, sales, and delivery

Improve efficiency and eliminate bottlenecks



5. Content & Funnel Alignment

Ensure content connects to offers and funnels

Support implementation of lead generation systems

Coordinate scheduling and backend content workflows



6. Performance Tracking

Track funnel performance (conversion rates, drop-offs, sales)

Provide weekly insights and recommendations

Identify areas for optimization



First 30 Days (Expected Outcomes):



Audit and organize existing offers, drafts, and assets

Identify and prioritize one core offer for launch

Build and launch a low-ticket funnel

Set up ManyChat automation connected to the funnel

Establish backend systems for ongoing execution





Required Skills & Experience:



Proven experience building funnels inside GoHighLevel, Kajabi, or similar platforms

Strong understanding of online coaching businesses and digital products

Experience with ManyChat,
 marketing systems, and automations

Ability to build systems from incomplete or messy inputs

Strong technical and problem-solving skills

Ability to execute quickly without constant supervision



Ideal Candidate:



Hands-on and execution-driven, not just a manager

Comfortable working with evolving ideas and direction

Fast, resourceful, and solution-oriented

Understands how backend systems support sales and growth

Takes ownership and moves projects forward independently



What This Role Is NOT:



Not a content creator or brand strategist

Not a passive assistant waiting for tasks

Not focused on paid ads or ad management



Working Style:



You take initiative and ownership of projects

You prioritize execution over perfection

You communicate clearly and proactively

You bring solutions, not just questions



Goal of This Role:



To build a structured, scalable backend for She Who Scales, where offers, funnels, and systems are fully operational, allowing the founder to focus on content, visibility, and sales.

title: Voice UGC Video Editor — Nightlife Conten
description:
I'm looking for a content creator to produce 20 short-form videos per week for a nightlife brand. This is a fully remote ongoing monthly role. You will research nightlife content relevant to the Dallas bar and club scene, edit it into engaging short-form videos, and record a conversational voiceover for each piece.



All voiceovers must be recorded in a clear American English accent. The tone should feel like a friend giving a recommendation — casual, warm, and genuine. Not a script, not a commercial. AI voices are not allowed and will be flagged for termination.



All videos delivered in vertical 9:16 format optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. Ideal length 15–60 seconds per piece.



To apply please include: 2–3 examples of short-form videos with your voiceover, a 20–30 second voice sample, and your monthly rate for 80 pieces per month.



Compensation is open based on experience and quality. Ongoing arrangement with room to grow. All content becomes brand property upon delivery. Will pay bonuses for videos that reach over 300k views.

title: Video Editor (Course Content + Social Media Ads)
description:
ABOUT US

We are an online education company that creates and sells digital courses helping business owners leverage AI to scale their operations. We are in pre-launch mode and growing fast. Our content is a mix of real filmed footage and AI-generated visuals (Veo3 avatar clips, screen recordings, slide sequences). We need a sharp video editor to bring it all together.



JOB TYPE: Full-Time (40 hours/week)

SCHEDULE: Flexible hours, some overlap with US Eastern Time preferred

LOCATION: Remote (Philippines)

SALARY: $500 - $700 USD/month (based on experience)



WHAT YOU WILL DO

- Edit and assemble course lesson videos from raw footage, AI avatar clips (Veo3), slide recordings, screen recordings, and B-roll

- Edit short-form video ads (15-60 seconds) for
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube

- Add captions, lower thirds, text overlays, transitions, and branded intros/outros

- Sync voiceover audio (ElevenLabs AI voice) with video clips using tools like Sync Labs or CapCut

- Create thumbnails for course lessons and YouTube videos

- Organize and manage video assets in shared folders (Google Drive)

- Deliver finished videos in correct formats and aspect ratios for each platform (16:9, 9:16, 1:1)

- Batch process videos efficiently — we produce multiple lessons and ads per week



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

- 2+ years of video editing experience (course content, YouTube, or social media ads preferred)

- Proficient in CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or Adobe Premiere Pro

- Experience editing short-form vertical video for social media ads

- Ability to sync audio and video from separate sources

- Good eye for pacing, transitions, and visual storytelling

- Comfortable working with AI-generated video clips and adapting to new tools

- Strong file organization habits

- Reliable internet connection and own computer with editing software



NICE TO HAVE

- Experience with motion graphics or After Effects

- Familiarity with AI video tools (Veo3, HeyGen, Sync Labs)

- Basic graphic design skills (Canva, Photoshop)

- Experience editing for Kajabi or other course platforms



HOW TO APPLY

Send your application with:

- A link to your portfolio or 2-3 sample videos you have edited (course content or ads preferred)

- A short message about your editing experience and the tools you use daily

- Your expected monthly salary in USD



Applications without a portfolio or samples will not be reviewed.

title: Paid Ads & Digital Marketing Specialist (Meta, Google, TikTok)
description:
ABOUT US

We are an online education company selling digital courses ($47-$297 price range) that help business owners use AI to scale their operations. We have a fully built sales funnel (Kajabi),
 sequences, ad creatives, and a ScoreApp quiz funnel ready to go. We need someone who can take all of this and run profitable paid ad campaigns from day one.



JOB TYPE: Full-Time (40 hours/week)

SCHEDULE: Flexible hours, some overlap with US Eastern Time preferred

LOCATION: Remote (Philippines)

SALARY: $600 - $900 USD/month + performance bonuses



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Primary focus — Paid Advertising (70% of your time):

- Set up, launch, and manage Meta 
/Instagram) ad campaigns end-to-end

- Set up and manage Google Ads campaigns (Search, YouTube, Display)

- Set up and manage TikTok ad campaigns

- Monitor campaign performance daily — adjust targeting, bids, budgets, and creatives based on data

- Run A/B tests on ad copy, creatives, audiences, and landing pages

- Track conversions using Meta Pixel, Google Tag Manager, and TikTok Pixel

- Build and manage retargeting and lookalike audiences

- Provide weekly performance reports with clear recommendations



Secondary responsibilities (30% of your time):

- Schedule and publish organic social media content across platforms (content will be provided)

- Monitor Kajabi dashboard —
 sequence performance, enrollments, and customer support inquiries

- Respond to basic customer support
s and questions

- Help maintain and update Kajabi sales pages and funnels as needed

- Assist with Zapier automations between ScoreApp, Kajabi, and other tools



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

- 2+ years managing paid ad campaigns on Meta Ads Manager (this is the most important skill)

- Proven track record of running profitable campaigns for digital products, courses, or e-commerce

- Experience with Google Ads (Search and YouTube campaigns)

- Strong understanding of conversion tracking, pixel setup, and attribution

- Comfortable reading ad dashboards and making data-driven optimization decisions

- Experience with audience building: lookalikes, retargeting, interest-based targeting

- Good written English — you may need to tweak ad copy and respond to customers

- Self-starter who can manage campaigns independently without daily direction

- Reliable internet connection



NICE TO HAVE

- Experience with TikTok Ads Manager

- Familiarity with Kajabi (or similar course platforms like Teachable, Thinkific)

- Experience with ScoreApp, Zapier, or similar automation tools

- Background in marketing online courses or digital info products

- Basic understanding of funnel strategy (TOFU/MOFU/BOFU)



HOW TO APPLY

Send your application with:

- Screenshots or case studies showing ad campaign results you have managed (ROAS, CPA, or revenue metrics preferred)

- A short message explaining which ad platforms you are strongest on and the types of products you have promoted

- Your expected monthly salary in USD



Applications without proof of ad management experience will not be reviewed.

title: Product/Creatives Researcher
description:
We’re looking for a high-level product researcher who can consistently bring in winning products, competitor insights, and ready-to-run creatives for EU meta advertising. Your job is simple: find early-stage winning products (not saturated, not branded), break down competitor ads (Meta/shopify/funnels online), and deliver full product packs with angles, creatives, and deep reasoning on why it will sell.



 You MUST also source ads DAILY — minimum 10+ for each product (videos + images), and go 5x deeper when needed so we always have enough creatives to test aggressively. This is NOT basic research — you need to understand what makes a product convert, validate demand with real data  longevity/reach etc., and think like an operator, not a VA, since strong researchers are expected to analyze trends, competitors, and positioning before anything gets tested . 



We don’t want random product lists — we want actionable insights we can launch immediately in our EU stores. Must have done job before and understanding in product research (beauty/health/welness) only, strong understanding of ad libraries + creatives, and ability to work independently without hand-holding. To apply, send 1 product with full breakdown (why it wins, audience, ads, angle, supplier) — who doesn't mention avocado will get ignored.



Looking forward to have you in our team !



Regards

title: Social Media Specialist
description:
JOB OVERVIEW



About Us:

CozifyHome is a dynamic and growing e-commerce brand. We are looking for a creative and data-driven individual to join our team and take our online presence to the next level.



Job Overview:



We are seeking a versatile Social Media Specialist to manage our digital storefront and social media landscapes. You will be the voice of our brand across Facebook, Tiktok and Instagram, responsible for building engaged communities and driving sales. Your role is crucial in bridging creative social content with our e-commerce platform, Shopify, to create a seamless customer journey from discovery to purchase.



Key Responsibilities:

- Social Media Management (Facebook, TikTok & Instagram):

- Develop and execute a cohesive social media strategy to increase brand awareness, engagement, and conversions.

- Create, curate, and publish high-quality, original content (including graphics, photos, videos, and Reels) daily.

- Manage all community interactions—responding to comments and messages in a timely and brand-appropriate manner.

- Plan and manage social media advertising campaigns on Facebook and Instagram to promote products, grow our audience, and achieve specific KPIs.

- Monitor social media trends, tools, and applications and recommend strategies for adoption.

- Collaborate on the creation of marketing assets (e.g., email banners, product graphics) that align with the brand identity.



Analytics & Reporting:

-Track, analyze, and report on social media performance (engagement, reach, follower growth) and e-commerce metrics (traffic, conversion rate).



Qualifications & Required Experience:

- A minimum of 1 year of professional experience in a similar role, managing social media activities.

- Demonstrable experience creating engaging content and growing a community on Facebook and Instagram.

- Portfolio or examples of social media you have created and managed.

- Proficiency with graphic design tools (e.g., Canva, Adobe Creative Suite) for creating social media assets.

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills with a keen eye for detail.

- Ability to work independently, manage multiple projects, and meet deadlines.



Preferred Skills (Bonus Points):

- Experience with social media scheduling and analytics tools (e.g., Meta Business Suite, Hootsuite, Buffer, Later).

- Basic knowledge of SEO principles for content and product pages.

- Understanding of paid social advertising (Facebook/Instagram Ads Manager).



What We Offer:

- A creative and collaborative work environment.

- The opportunity to make a significant impact on a growing brand.



How to Apply:

If you are a creative and analytical marketer who lives and breathes social media and e-commerce, we would love to hear from you! Please submit your resume, a link to your portfolio or relevant work samples, and a brief cover letter explaining why you are the perfect fit for this role.

title: Experienced manual accessibility tester needed
description:
My name is Helen and  I'm looking for an experienced manual accessibility tester to work with me on a freelance, per-audit basis.



Here's how the work is structured. I run an automated pipeline before any manual testing begins. It covers around 13 WCAG 2.2 criteria and pre-populates a custom audit tool with results, screenshots, and evidence. What I need from you is everything that comes after that.



Your work splits into two areas:



1. Spot-check verification — reviewing criteria the automation has flagged as passed, and confirming those calls are correct using NVDA, browser DevTools, BrowserStack, Stark, and physical device testing where relevant.



2. Manual completion — testing the remaining WCAG 2.2 A and AA criteria that automation cannot reliably cover. You will document your findings directly in the audit tool I provide, following the same evidence format the automation uses.



You'll receive the pre-populated audit tool, a JSON results file, and the list of URLs tested. All the context you need to get started will be with those files. Shared BrowserStack access will be provided where required.



What I'm looking for:

- Solid WCAG 2.2 A and AA knowledge at criterion level

- Genuine NVDA experience, not just familiarity

- Comfortable with BrowserStack, Stark, and browser DevTools

- Able to work from a structured brief without needing a lot of back and forth

- Available for roughly 4 audits per month on a consistent basis



I'm based in Bali, so timezone-wise we're close, which makes communication straightforward.



If this sounds like a good fit, please share experience you have, your availability, day rate,
 address, and WhatsApp number and we can take it from there.

title: Commercial Operations & Systems Coordinator – Water Storage Tank Projects
description:
Raven Tanks is seeking a sharp, systems minded operator to help improve how our business runs across sales, quoting, and operations.



This is not a standard admin or estimating role. We are looking for someone highly intelligent who can think critically, build and improve workflows, and help connect our systems so the business runs faster and cleaner.



We currently run our pipeline through Pipedrive, and a big part of this role is improving how that system works in practice. This includes tightening up deal flow, follow up, handovers between sales and operations, and building automations to reduce manual work.



You will work directly with the leadership team to streamline processes, improve visibility across the pipeline, and support quoting and project coordination where required.



What you’ll do:



Review how work currently flows across sales, quoting, and operations

Identify gaps, inefficiencies, and areas for improvement

Build and improve workflows within Pipedrive and across our internal systems

Set up and manage automations (Zapier or similar) to reduce manual work

Improve follow up systems so deals don’t get lost or delayed

Support quoting by structuring information, templates, and outputs

Assist with project coordination tasks such as packing lists, job prep, and handovers

Maintain clean, structured data across our systems

Work closely with the team to make processes faster, clearer, and more reliable



We’re looking for:



Exceptional English communication, both written and spoken

Strong logical thinking and problem solving ability

Someone who naturally looks for better, faster ways of doing things

Comfortable working with data, systems, and structured workflows

Experience with Pipedrive or similar CRM systems

Experience with automation tools such as Zapier, Make, or similar

Some exposure to sales or sales support, with an understanding of how deals move through a pipeline

High attention to detail and strong organisational skills

Ability to take ownership and improve things without being told step by step

Reliable internet and consistent availability aligned with AEST business hours



This role suits someone who enjoys systems, structure, and problem solving. You should be comfortable working independently, taking ownership of tasks, and improving how things are done across the business.



We are not looking for someone to just follow instructions. We are looking for someone who can think, build, and improve.



Important:



Do not send a resume.



To apply, send a one minute whatsApp video to Matt on 
including all of the below.



Start your message with the word RAVEN.

title: Procurement & Systems Coordinator – Automation & Costing

We’re looking for:



Exceptional English communication, both written and spoken

Strong logical thinking and problem solving ability

Highly comfortable working with Excel or Google Sheets

Someone who enjoys building structured systems and working with data

Experience with automation tools such as Zapier, Make, or similar

Strong attention to detail and ability to work with numbers accurately

Ability to think through problems and improve how things are done

Reliable internet and consistent availability aligned with AEST business hours



This role suits someone who enjoys working with data, systems, and problem solving. You should be comfortable taking ownership of tasks, building structure where there is none, and improving how the business operates.



We are not looking for someone to follow a checklist. We are looking for someone who can think, build, and improve.



Important:



Do not send a resume.



To apply, send a one minute WhatsApp video to Matt on 
including all of the below.



Start your message with the word RAVEN.

60–90 second video

title: Marketing & Content Growth
description:
About the Role:



I am looking for a highly organised and creative Virtual Assistant to help grow a business focused podcast and media brand.



The platform explores business, investment, and innovation across Africa, with a global audience of founders, investors, and professionals.



This role is ideal for someone with a strong marketing mindset who understands content, growth, and execution.

________________________________________



What You Will Be Responsible For

1. Content Creation & Editing

• Create Instagram Reels and posts 

• Edit YouTube Shorts from podcast content 

• Design LinkedIn content including posts and simple audiograms 

• Repurpose long form podcast content into multiple short form clips 

• Write engaging captions aligned with a professional business audience 

________________________________________



2. Content Planning & Scheduling

• Manage a weekly content calendar 

• Schedule and post content across platforms: 

Instagram daily 

YouTube Shorts at least 3 times per week 

LinkedIn consistently each week 

• Ensure consistency and quality across all platforms 

________________________________________



3. Growth & Engagement

• Help grow Instagram, YouTube, and LinkedIn audiences 

• Respond to comments and messages 

• Engage with relevant accounts and communities 

• Encourage listeners to leave reviews and follow the podcast 

________________________________________



4. Podcast Guest Outreach & Coordination

• Research and identify high quality podcast guests 

• Send outreach messages and manage follow ups 

• Schedule confirmed guests 

• Follow up with past guests for potential collaborations 

________________________________________



5. Creative Input & Strategy

• Suggest new content ideas and formats 

• Identify trends and adapt them to the brand 

• Continuously improve content performance 

________________________________________



6. Performance Tracking

• Track content performance (views, engagement, growth) 

• Provide simple weekly reports and insights 

________________________________________



Requirements

• Strong experience in social media marketing and content creation 

• Experience editing short form video (CapCut, Adobe Premiere or similar) 

• Familiar with Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn 

• Good written English (important) 

• Highly organised and proactive 

• Able to work independently and meet deadlines 

• Interest in business, entrepreneurship, or global markets is a strong advantage 

________________________________________



Bonus Skills (Not Required but Valuable)

• Experience working with media brands

• Canva design skills 

• Basic understanding of SEO for YouTube or podcasts 

• Experience with outreach or lead generation 

________________________________________



What Success Looks Like

• Consistent high-quality content being posted weekly 

• Growth in followers and engagement 

• Smooth and professional guest coordination 

• New ideas that improve performance over time 

________________________________________



Working Details

• Part time to start (with potential to grow into full time) 

• Long term role for the right person 

• Flexible working hours, but consistency is key 

________________________________________



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

1. Links to social media accounts or content you have worked on 

2. Examples of short form videos you have edited 

3. A short paragraph on how you would help grow a podcast brand 

4. Your favourite social media platform and why 

Start your application with the word: Africa

(so I know you have read this properly)

________________________________________



Final Note

I am looking for someone reliable, proactive, and serious about growth. If you are just looking for basic task work, this role is not for you.



If you want to be part of building a meaningful global brand, I would like to hear from you.

title: Brand Operations & Generalist VA — moongreens.com
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION:



We're Moongreens (
) — a nightly sleep and recovery supplement brand launching in the US in June 2026. Built by a serial founder with 15+ years in consumer brands. Small team, real ambition, no fluff.



This is the most important hire on the team. You are the right hand. You'll touch almost everything — and what you do will actually matter.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN:



Customer Service



Gorgias inbox management (tickets, order queries, refunds)

First response and resolution, escalate edge cases to founder



Community Management



Replies to comments on Meta ads

TikTok + Instagram inbox, DMs, shares

Organic social comment replies (using a tone-of-voice framework we'll build together)



Creator & Gifting Ops



Influencer tracking via SocialSnowball

Gifting outreach coordination and follow-up

Chasing deliverables, logging results



Investor & Outreach



AimFox management

Wefunder community management and
 nurture

Investor research and list building



Content Ops



Uploading blogs to the website

Organising video assets for Meta ads

Posting support and overflow as needed



General Ops



Weekly snapshot reporting

SOP documentation over time

Ad hoc tasks as directed



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR:



- You write like a human, not a VA. You can pick up a brand voice fast.

- You've worked on a DTC or consumer brand before — you know what brand voice means in practice.

- You context-switch without dropping things. One hour CX, next hour gifting tracker.

- You're proactive. You flag problems before they become fires and you propose solutions.

- You're comfortable learning new tools. Gorgias, Shopify, Slack, Google Sheets — you're not afraid of any of them.



TO APPLY:



Send a short intro (3–5 sentences, your own words — no templates), examples of brands you've supported, your available start date, and one thing you noticed about Moongreens that you'd improve or do differently. That last bit is important to us.



WAGE: $600–$900+ per month depending on experience

HOURS: 40 hours/week

BUSINESS NAME: Moongreens / Midnight Atlas Inc

title: E-Commerce Order Manager – Fashion Dropshipping (Supply Chain)
description:
We are looking for a highly experienced E-Commerce Fashion Dropshipping Order Manager with proven hands-on experience working with the Service Points fulfillment platform. If you have not worked with Service Points before, please do not apply — this is a hard requirement for this role.



About the role:



We are a fast-growing dropshipping fashion brand and we are genuinely excited to find the right person to join our team! As our Order Manager, you will be at the heart of everything we do — making sure our customers receive exactly what they ordered, on time, every time. If you are someone who loves bringing order to chaos, takes pride in getting the details right, and thrives in a fast-paced e-commerce environment, then we think you might be exactly who we are looking for!



What you will be doing:



You will own the full order journey from the 
nt a customer hits "buy" to the 
nt their package lands at their door. This means quoting products with suppliers to make sure we are always getting great prices, negotiating better deals where you can, and catching any discrepancies before they become problems. You will carefully check that every order has the right variants — the right size, the right color, the right style — so our customers always get exactly what they paid for.

You will keep our order tracking spreadsheet accurate, up to date, and organised every single day. Statuses, tracking numbers, supplier references, notes — everything in its place. We rely on this and we need someone who takes real pride in keeping it spotless.



You will be our go-to person for all supplier communication — following up on delays, finding quick solutions when something is out of stock, resolving shipping issues, and handling quality concerns with a calm and professional approach. You will work hand in hand with our customer service team so they always have the right information to keep our customers happy.



And beyond the daily work — we would absolutely love it if you spot patterns, flag issues before they grow, and bring ideas for how we can do things even better. We are always looking to improve and we truly value people who think ahead.



What we are looking for:



Proven hands-on experience with Service Points is an absolute must — without this, we are not able to move forward with your application. Alongside that, you bring real experience in e-commerce order management in a dropshipping environment, you are confident in Google Sheets or Excel, and you are the kind of person who is naturally organised and on top of every detail. You stay cool under pressure, you are a clear and friendly communicator in English, and you genuinely enjoy being part of a small, driven team that is building something great together.



???? Before you apply, please watch this short video where we walk you through the role in detail — this will give you a much better feel for who we are and exactly what we are looking for:



????
