 with subject line: Legal VA Application — [Your Name]



IMPORTANT — Read This Before Applying

To demonstrate your attention to detail, your application
 must begin with the following phrase:



     "Jackson Law Firm runs on excellence."



Applications that do not open with this exact phrase will not be reviewed.



Your resume or CV

Answer these two questions in your
: (1) Describe a time you managed multiple urgent tasks at once — what did you do? (2) What experience do you have with legal or medical terminology?

title: Google Ads Manager – Call-Driven Local Clinic
description:
We run a local clinic where every conversion starts with a phone call.

We're not looking for someone to manage campaigns. We're looking for someone who thinks in calls — who understands that in our market, the quality of who calls matters more than how many people call.

If you've only optimized for volume, this probably isn't the right fit.

What you'll be doing



Manage and optimize Google Ads Search campaigns

Identify and eliminate wasted spend from search terms

Improve call quality — not just call volume

Review and improve call tracking and attribution

Align ads and landing pages with real caller intent

Diagnose whether problems come from traffic quality, tracking gaps, landing pages, or call handling



What matters to us



Fewer junk calls, higher percentage of qualified calls

Higher booking rate per call

Clear thinking and fast decisions

Direct communication — no fluff



What we're looking for



Proven experience with Google Ads Search for local lead generation

Experience with call-driven accounts where not every caller is a qualified lead

Strong grasp of search terms, negative keyword strategy, match types, and geo and device performance

Ability to act, not just analyze



A strong plus

Experience in verticals where caller qualification is a core problem — legal, dental, home services, financial services, or similar. You don't need to know our industry. You need to have solved this type of problem before.

To apply

Send us a brief note covering:



What type of accounts you've managed and roughly how long

One call-driven account you've worked on — what the main problem was and what you did about it

Your availability for a short Zoom call



Next step

Qualified applicants will be invited to a live Zoom session where we walk through real account scenarios together. No presentations, no decks. Just a conversation about how you think.

description:
ITDW Group is seeking a talented Sales Development Representative to support our global sales efforts and help revolutionize the industry.

title: Amazon Ecommerce Operations Assistant (Full-Time, Flexible Schedule)
description:
About Us:



We are a fast-growing U.S.-based e-commerce company selling products across Amazon (primary), with additional presence on Walmart and eBay.

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented tea
mber to support daily operations, starting with data and pricing tasks, with the opportunity to grow into more advanced operational responsibilities over time.

This is a long-term, full-time role for someone who wants to learn, take ownership, and grow with the company.



Core Responsibilities (Daily Work):

- Perform accurate data entry and updates in Google Sheets and internal systems

- Track and update product pricing and cost data based on supplier changes

- Maintain product data, including costs (COGS), miscellaneous costs, pricing, and expiry dates

- Ensure data accuracy and consistency across different sheets/systems and fix mismatches

- Perform regular data cleanup, organization, and accuracy checks



Operations & Growth Responsibilities:

- Assist with Amazon FBA, Walmart WFS shipment creation and basic operations tasks (training will be provided); Shipment-related work is not daily and will be introduced gradually as you gain experience. This will be a major portion of the role.

- Support basic inventory and inspection-related updates (e.g., expiry tracking, simple checks)



Working Hours:

- This is a full-time role with a flexible but structured schedule

- Work will gradually move into a split-shift schedule (Philippines time) within the following general time ranges:

     --Midday hours (approximately 10 AM – 3 PM PHT)

        --Used for coordination with the CEO and the Philippines-based team

        --Focus on data entry, pricing updates, and general operations

    --Late evening to early morning hours (approximately 10 PM – 2 AM PHT)

       --Used for alignment with U.S. daytime operations (e.g., shipments, time-sensitive tasks)

       --In the beginning, most work will be during midday hours while you are being trained and getting familiar with the systems

- Shipment-related work will be introduced gradually, and evening/night hours will increase over time

- Exact hours may vary depending on workload, but will remain within these general time ranges

- You must be comfortable working a flexible split schedule as the role evolves

- Regular communication and coordination with the CEO and team are required



To Apply – Answer All Questions Below:

1. Do you have experience with Amazon FBA shipment creation (wholesale model)?

-  If yes, briefly describe what you have done.

-  If no, just say no.

2. How many years of experience do you have with the Amazon wholesale model?

- Be specific. Do not include OA/RA or other unrelated experience.

3. What have you done inside Amazon Seller Central?

- Focus on actual tasks (pricing updates, product data, shipments, etc.)

4. Do you have experience with repricing tools (e.g., adding COGS, updating costs, managing pricing rules)?

5. Are you comfortable working a flexible split schedule (including late evening/night hours)?



Important – Read Before Applying

- You must have prior experience with the Amazon wholesale model (this role is primarily Amazon-focused)

- You should be familiar with:

   ASIN / FNSKU structure

  Product cost components (COGS, miscellaneous costs, etc.) 

  Experience with Walmart or eBay is a plus, but not required

   You must answer all application questions and include a link to your resume



IMPORTANT:

*****PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT HAVE AMAZON WHOLESALE EXPERIENCE. APPLICATIONS THAT DO NOT MEET THIS REQUIREMENT, OR THAT INCLUDE GENERIC / AI-GENERATED (CHAT-GPT) RESPONSES, WILL BE IGNORED AND MAY BE MARKED AS SPAM.*****

title: YouTube Video Editor
description:
**Title:** Video Editor — Pop Culture / Anime / Movies YouTube Channel (Long-Form & Short-Form)



**About Us:**



CM Studios is a growing YouTube channel focused on pop culture content — movies, anime, cartoons, TV shows, Star Wars, Marvel, DC, horror, and collectibles. We create both long-form YouTube videos and daily short-form content (Shorts, Reels, TikToks) and are looking for a skilled video editor to join our team and help us scale. We plan for this role to grow as the channel grows.



**What You'll Be Doing:**



- Editing long-form YouTube videos (our priority — at least one quality video per month)

- Editing daily short-form videos (15-60 seconds) for YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram Reels

- You will receive raw recorded footage and creative direction fro
 — I record all content and will communicate the vision for each video. You can also review the existing channel to understand the style and direction.

- You should have some relative knowledge of the niche. You don't have to be an expert — I am the expert. You can ask questions where needed, but I do expect you to be able to find quality clips, quality SFX, and quality level clips on your own.

- After each video is uploaded, spending approximately 1 hour on community engagement: responding to comments on our content and engaging with related creators' content to boost visibility

- Maintaining a consistent upload schedule and being available during upload windows



**What We're Looking For:**



- Proven experience editing both long-form and short-form content for YouTube

- Must have edited at least one short-form video that reached **1,000,000+ views on YouTube Shorts** or **10,000,000+ views on TikTok** (please include link)

- Must have edited at least one long-form video that reached **100,000+ views on YouTube** (please include link)

- Strong skills in storytelling, pacing, sound design, transitions, and retention editing for long-form YouTube content

- Strong understanding of hooks, text overlays, and trending editing styles for short-form platforms

- Familiarity with pop culture content — movies, anime (Dragon Ball, Naruto, One Piece, etc.), cartoons, TV shows, Star Wars, Marvel/DC, and horror

- Understanding of YouTube algorithm and what makes both long-form and short-form content perform

- Reliable internet connection and ability to communicate clearly in English

- Experience with community engagement and understanding of engagement strategies is a plus



**How You'll Be Paid:**



- **Short-form videos:** Per-video rate, hourly rate, or whatever pricing structure works best for you — just tell us how you prefer to charge for short-form edits

- **Long-form videos:** Hourly rate or per-project rate — tell us your preferred pricing structure

- **Engagement work:** 1 hour of community engagement paid after each upload

- Payment issued upon completion of each video cycle (edit + engagement hour)

- Consistent, ongoing work — this role is designed to grow as the channel grows



**To Apply, Please Include:**



1. A brief introduction about yourself and your editing experience

2. A link to at least one short-form video you edited that reached 1M+ views on YouTube Shorts or 10M+ on TikTok

3. A link to at least one long-form video you edited that reached 100K+ views on YouTube

4. Links to your portfolio or channels you've edited for, showing both long-form and short-form work

5. Your pricing: how you charge for short-form edits and your hourly or per-project rate for long-form

6. Review our content across all platforms (links below) and answer this question: **Pick one of our existing videos (long-form or short-form) and explain specifically how you would have edited it differently to get more views.** Be specific — mention the hook, pacing, storytelling, retention, transitions, or any changes you'd make.



**Our Channels (please review before applying):**

- YouTube: 

- TikTok: 

- Instagram: 

- Letterboxd: 



**Trial Period:**



Selected candidates will be given a paid trial — editing one 15-20 second test video to evaluate fit, style, and quality before moving forward.



**Important:** To confirm you've read this entire post carefully, please include the phrase **"the iron giant"** somewhere in your response.

title: Anti-Bot & Browser Fingerprinting Specialist — Web Automation (Remote)
description:
ABOUT US:

VisaBridge is a licensed travel agency specializing in Portuguese visa appointment automation. We currently operate a fully functional automation system (Python + Playwright) that processes
appointments every Friday. Our code works, but the embassy's anti-bot detection is constantly evolving. We need a specialist who can keep our system INVISIBLE to server-side detection — permanently.



THE REALITY:

Every Friday at 11:40 AM Lisbon time,
appointment slots are released and fully booked within 1-5 MINUTES. Our competitors use elite-level automation with advanced anti-detection techniques. The embassy is actively investing in bot detection technology. Any system that is identified as a bot gets blocked immediately — resulting in zero appointments for that session. This is a constant arms race, and we intend to WIN it.



YOUR MISSION:

You will analyze the embassy's anti-bot detection mechanisms and ensure our automation system passes ALL detection checks. You will also be on standby during booking windows to deploy countermeasures in real-time if the embassy updates their detection.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:

• Analyze the target server's bot detection — identify exactly what checks are performed (fingerprinting, header analysis, TLS fingerprint, behavioral analysis, rate limiting)

• Implement browser fingerprint spoofing — Canvas, WebGL, AudioContext, fonts, hardware concurrency, screen resolution, plugins, navigator properties

• Manipulate TLS fingerprints (JA3/JA4) to match genuine Chrome browser traffic

• Build dynamic header injection — headers must vary realistically per request, not be static

• Implement cookie/session persistence across booking cycles to reduce login frequency

• Build User-Agent rotation with CONSISTENT header sets (UA + sec-ch-ua + Accept + Accept-Language must all match)

• Monitor embassy website changes and deploy detection countermeasures BEFORE competitors adapt

• Stay on standby every Friday during booking window (6:50 PM - 9:00 PM PH time) to deploy emergency fixes



CRITICAL REQUIREMENT:

The embassy website and anti-bot systems change WITHOUT NOTICE. You MUST be available to analyze changes and deploy fixes IMMEDIATELY — especially on Fridays during the booking window. A 30-minute delay means losing thousands of euros. This is non-negotiable.



REQUIREMENTS:

• 4+ years experience in web scraping and browser automation

• Deep expertise in browser fingerprinting techniques

• Experience with TLS fingerprint manipulation (JA3/JA4)

• Strong knowledge of HTTP protocols, headers, and browser behavior

• Experience with network analysis tools (Wireshark, Charles Proxy)

• Python + Playwright advanced level

• Experience bypassing bot detection systems (Cloudflare, DataDome, PerimeterX, or similar)

• Ability to reverse-engineer anti-bot mechanisms from network traffic analysis

• Fast turnaround on detection countermeasures

• Stable internet connection (minimum 20 Mbps)



COMPENSATION:

• $1,200 - $2,500/month depending on experience level

• Performance bonus: $
/month based on detection evasion success rate

• Long-term position — this is an ongoing arms race, not a one-time project



HOW TO APPLY:

Send your resume along with:

1. Description of bot detection systems you have bypassed (with specific techniques used)

2. Your approach to browser fingerprint spoofing (tools, techniques, results)

3. How you would analyze a server's detection mechanism from scratch

4. Your available start date (earlier = better — competition is getting stronger every week)

title: Sales Closer — Help US Small Businesses Get Online ($10/hr + $50 Per Sale)
description:
About Us:                                                                                                                                             

  We're Typesite — we use AI to build custom websites for small businesses in under 30 minutes. Our product is live, we have paying customers, and we need someone to help us grow by reaching business owners who don't have a website yet.                                                                

                                                                                                                                                        

  The Role:

  You'll be calling US-based small business owners (landscapers, contractors, cleaning companies, etc.) who we've already identified as not having a website. This is a two-call process:                                                                                                                  

   

  Call 1 — The Easy Call:                                                                                                                               

  You offer to build them a free custom website. No catch, no credit card. You ask about their business, collect some basic info, and we build their site using AI in about 30 minutes.                                                                                                                    

   

  Call 2 — The Close:                                                                                                                                   

  You call them back, walk them through their finished website, and close them on a $50/month hosting subscription. They're looking at a real site with their business name, photos, and services already on it. You're not selling an idea — you're showing them something that's already built for them.    

   

  Compensation:                                                                                                                                         

  - $8-10/hr base (depending on experience)                       

  - $50 commission for every new paying subscriber you close                                                                                            

  - Top performers can realistically earn $3,000-4,000+ per month

                                                                                                                                                        

  Schedule:                                                                                                                                             

  - 30 hours/week (flexible within US business hours, roughly 8am-5pm EST)

  - Long-term ongoing role, not a short project                                                                                                         

                                                                  

  What We Provide:                                                                                                                                      

  - Pre-built lead lists of businesses without websites (you're not hunting for leads)

  - A product that builds itself in 30 minutes (you don't need to know anything technical)                                                              

  - A free offer for the first call that makes the conversation easy                      

  - Training on the product and the close                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                        

  You're a Great Fit If You:                                                                                                                            

  - Have experience calling US-based customers and are comfortable with American conversational style                                                   

  - Sound natural and warm on the phone — not robotic or scripted                                                                                       

  - Have done cold calling, appointment setting, or phone sales before                                                                                  

  - Can manage your own callback schedule without being micromanaged                                                                                    

  - Speak clear, confident English                                                                                                                      

  - Get excited about commission because you know you can close                                                                                         

                                                                                                                                                        

  How to Apply:                                                                                                                                         

  Record a 60-second voice note introducing yourself as if you're calling a landscaping business owner to offer them a free website. Don't read a script

   — just be yourself. Send it with your application. If I enjoy the conversation, we'll talk.

title: Credit Repair Sales Agent
description:
We are seeking an experienced Credit Repair Sales Agent whose primary responsibility is to convert leads into enrolled clients.



This is a sales-only position. You will not be handling disputes, backend processing, or account servicing.



Your role is to speak with inbound leads, identify their needs, present our services, and close them into our program. This position requires urgency, confidence, and the ability to consistently convert prospects into paying clients.



Key Responsibilities

 • Contact new leads immediately as they enter the pipeline

 • Conduct consultation calls to assess the prospect’s credit situation

 • Lead enrollment calls and guide clients into the program

 • Follow up with leads through calls, SMS, and CRM communication

 • Handle objections and confidently ask for the sale

 • Accurately document all interactions in GoHighLevel CRM

 • Maintain consistent communication with management



Compensation

 • Hourly pay based on experience

 • Commission per enrollment

 • Performance-based bonuses available



This is a performance-driven role with strong earning potential for the right candidate.

Minimum Requirements (Do Not Apply If You Do Not Meet These)

 • At least 1 year of credit repair experience

 • At least 2 years of sales experience (phone sales preferred)

 • Strong understanding of:

 • Credit reports

 • Collections, charge-offs, and late payments

 • Credit-building strategies

 • Excellent English communication skills (verbal and written)

 • Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

 • Ability to work U.S. business hours

Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate is:

 • Highly responsive and able to act quickly on new leads

 • Confident and in control of conversations

 • Results-driven and motivated by commission

 • Organized and detail-oriented

 • Professional in tone and communication

 • Consistent with follow-up and lead management

Performance Expectations

 • Contact leads within minutes of receiving them

 • Build rapport and clearly identify the prospect’s needs

 • Present the service in a structured and confident manner

 • Consistently convert leads into enrollments



Why Join Our Team

 • Consistent flow of inbound leads

 • Established brand with a strong reputation

 • Proven systems and structured sales process

 • Opportunity for growth and increased earnings

Important



This is not an entry-level position. We are looking for someone who already understands both credit repair and sales and can perform without constant supervision.

title: Sales/Admin VA
description:
Outbound Sales & Recruiting VA (Closer Backup) – U.S. Cleaning Company



We are hiring a high-performance Virtual Assistant who can handle outbound sales, recruiting cleaners, and stepping in to close inbound leads when needed.



This is not a passive admin role. This is a high-activity, results-driven position for someone who is comfortable with daily outreach, rejection, and real sales conversations.



If you are confident on the phone, can build trust quickly, and know how to turn conversations into results—we want to talk to you.





--What You’ll Be Doing Daily



- Outbound Sales (Primary Focus)

Make high-volume outbound calls to potential customers

Send
s and social media messages 
, Instagram, LinkedIn)

Generate new leads and booking opportunities

Follow up consistently with prospects



- Recruiting & Hiring Cleaners

Reach out to cleaner applicants (Indeed, social media, etc.)

Send pre-screening forms and review responses

Conduct initial interviews

Schedule test cleans for qualified candidates

Do basic research on candidates (social media checks, etc.)



- Inbound Sales Backup (High Skill Required)

Step in when lead volume is high

Handle inbound calls from interested customers

Follow a structured sales process

Overcome objections (pricing, trust, scheduling)

Close deals and book jobs





--Daily Activity Expectations



This is a high-output role focused on consistent outbound effort.



You should be prepared to:



Make up to 200 outbound calls per day

Send 50 social media messages per day

Send 50
s per day

Maintain ongoing follow-ups with leads and applicants



If you are not comfortable with high daily outreach, this role is not a fit.





--What We’re Looking For

Fluent, confident English (spoken and written)

Strong sales ability (must be able to close, not just talk)

Comfortable handling rejection and high call volume

Organized and detail-oriented (you will manage pipelines)

Able to switch between sales and recruiting tasks

Self-motivated and able to work without constant supervision





--Bonus (Not Required)

Experience with outbound sales or cold calling

Experience recruiting or hiring

Experience working with U.S.-based customers





--Tools You’ll Use

CRM & phone system (CleanWorks – based on GoHighLevel)

Booking system (BookingKoala)

, social media platforms





--Compensation & Schedule

$5–$6/hour (depending on experience)

Performance-based bonuses

Full-time (40 hours/week)

Must work during U.S. Central Time business hours





--IMPORTANT: How to Apply



To be considered, submit:



One Video (2–3 minutes total)



In a single video, answer ALL of the following:



Part 1 – Sales Experience



Tell us about a time you handled a sales objection and still closed the deal

What was the objection, and exactly how did you respond?

What was the outcome?



Part 2 – Outbound Thinking



If you had to generate new customers from scratch, what would you do in your first 3 days?



Part 3 – Problem Solving



A customer calls in upset because a cleaner did a poor job. How would you handle the situation?

OR

You need to find a new cleaner this week, but no one is applying. What would you do?

title: Social Media Manager, Podcast Manager, Executive Assistant
description:
Full-Time Virtual Assistant — Media & Content Operations

Company: The AI Report

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Hours: Full-time, 40 hours/week (Monday–Friday)

Salary: $1,000–$1,200 USD/month (based on experience)

Start Date: Immediately



About Us

The AI Report is one of the fastest-growing AI media companies in the world — 400,000+ newsletter subscribers, 61% open rate, two active podcasts, a YouTube channel, and a Circle community for executives. We're based in Montreal, Canada.



We're hiring a full-time VA to own our day-to-day content operations so our CEO can focus on growth, partnerships, and speaking engagements. This is a high-trust, high-responsibility role — not data entry.



Important: This role requires near-native English fluency — both written and spoken. You'll be writing public-facing content (show notes, YouTube descriptions, community posts) and communicating directly with the CEO daily via voice and video. If English isn't your strongest language, this isn't the right fit.



What You'll Do

Podcast & Audio Production (10–12 hrs/week)



Upload episodes to Spotify, Apple Podcasts, and YouTube



Generate and attach transcripts using AI tools



Write show notes and episode descriptions



Coordinate guest scheduling via Calendly



Create and schedule audiogram clips for social media



YouTube Management (6–8 hrs/week)



Upload videos with optimized titles, descriptions, tags, and thumbnails



Manage playlists and end screens



Monitor comments and flag anything needing a response



Track performance metrics weekly



Community Management (4–6 hrs/week)



Upload content to our Circle community



Monitor community engagement and respond to basic questions



Organize and tag community resources



Design Support (4–6 hrs/week)



Create social media graphics, thumbnails, and visual assets in Canva



Maintain brand consistency across all visual content



Resize and adapt creatives for different platforms



Admin & Operations (8–10 hrs/week)



Triage the CEO's inbox (Gmail)



Update contacts and deal stages in Notion CRM



Calendar management and meeting prep



Basic research tasks as needed



Maintain SOPs and checklists in Notion



Required Skills

Near-native English fluency — written and spoken. You'll write public-facing content and speak with the CEO daily. This is non-negotiable.



Experience with YouTube (uploading, metadata, thumbnails)



Experience with podcast hosting platforms (Spotify for Podcasters, Apple Podcasts Connect, RSS)



Experience using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, or similar) in your daily workflow



Comfortable working in Notion



Design skills — able to create and edit graphics in Canva or similar tools



Tech-savvy and fast learner — you'll also use Circle, Calendly, and Google Workspace



Self-starter who works independently, follows SOPs, and flags problems early



Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace



Nice-to-Have

Familiarity with the AI industry



Video editing experience



Experience supporting a CEO or founder directly



What Success Looks Like

Week 1: You've learned all our platforms, completed onboarding, and handled your first episode uploads and YouTube posts independently.



Month 1: You own the full podcast-to-publish pipeline. Episodes go live on time, every time. YouTube is updated same-day. Circle is active and organized. The CEO's inbox is clean.



Month 3: You're anticipating needs before being asked. You've improved our SOPs. You're flagging performance insights. The CEO spends zero time on operations.



Compensation & Growth

$1,000–$1,200 USD/month based on experience



Paid Philippine holidays



Performance review and raise opportunity at 90 days



Path to Content Operations Manager as the company scales



You'll work directly with the CEO — high-visibility role with real impact



How to Apply

Record a short video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself, your experience, and why you're a good fit. Upload to YouTube (unlisted) or Loom and share the link.



Attach your resume or portfolio



Answer these questions in your application:



What is your experience with YouTube channel management? Give a specific example.



Have you worked with podcast hosting platforms before? Which ones?



Describe a time you managed multiple recurring tasks with tight deadlines. How did you stay organized?



What AI tools do you currently use, and how do you use them in your work?



What is your current internet speed? (Run a test at speedtest.net and share the result)

, Instagram, LinkedIn)

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant (CRM + Follow-Up Specialist)
description:
I am a Real Estate Broker looking for a reliable and detail-oriented assistant to help manage my leads and follow-up system.



This is a structured role, not a creative one.

You will be responsible for keeping my pipeline organized and making sure no lead is missed.





Your Responsibilities

 • Enter new leads into CRM

 • Send follow-up messages (templates provided)

 • Track conversations and update statuses

 • Ensure every lead has a next follow-up

 • Provide a short daily report





Who This Role Is For



You are a good fit if you:

 • Follow instructions exactly

 • Are organized and consistent

 • Prefer clear systems over guessing

 • Communicate clearly in writing





Who This Role Is NOT For



This is NOT for you if you:

 • Prefer creative or marketing work

 • Need constant supervision

 • Do not like repetitive tasks

 • Miss small details





Important Instructions (Read Carefully)



To apply, you must do ALL of the following:

 1. Start your message with the word READY

 2. Answer this question clearly:



“If I give you 5 new leads today, what steps would you take to follow up and track them?”



 3. Keep your answer simple and structured (bullet points preferred)





Hours & Pay

 • Part-time (10–20 hours/week)

 • Long-term opportunity

 • Pay based on experience





Final Note



I am looking for someone reliable who can follow a system and execute daily tasks consistently.



If you are organized and dependable, this will be a long-term position.

title: Video & Graphics Designer
description:
Location: Remote



Job Summary:

We are seeking a creative and highly organized Virtual Assistant to join our team. This role is perfect for someone with a strong eye for design and a passion for creating engaging visual content. The ideal candidate will be proficient in video editing and graphic design, with a strong emphasis on using Canva and leveraging AI tools to enhance their work. You will be responsible for creating on-brand visuals to support our marketing efforts across various digital platforms.



Key Responsibilities:



Video & Motion Graphics: Create and edit short-form video content (e.g., for Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) and longer-form videos (e.g., for YouTube). This includes adding text overlays, motion graphics, intros, and outros, as well as simple animations.



Graphic Design: Design a wide range of marketing materials, including social media graphics (posts, stories, carousels), ad creatives, blog headers,
 newsletters, and presentation slides.



Canva Proficiency: Utilize Canva to create, edit, and maintain a library of reusable branded templates. You will be responsible for ensuring all designs adhere to our brand guidelines.



AI Integration: Use AI tools (e.g., AI image generators, text-to-video tools, or ChatGPT for content ideas) to streamline the creative process, generate ideas, and enhance the quality and efficiency of your work.



Asset Management: Organize and manage all design files, brand assets, and content in a structured and accessible manner.



Collaboration: Work closely with the marketing and content teams to understand project requirements, provide creative input, and ensure timely delivery of high-quality visuals.



Qualifications and Skills:



Proven experience as a virtual assistant, graphic designer, or a similar role.



Proficiency in Canva is required; experience with other design software (e.g., Adobe Creative Suite, Figma) is a plus.



Experience with video editing software (e.g., DaVinci Resolve, CapCut, Premiere Pro) is a plus.



Demonstrated experience using AI tools for content creation and design.



Strong understanding of visual design principles, including color theory, typography, and layout.



Excellent attention to detail and ability to follow brand guidelines.



Self-motivated, proactive, and able to manage multiple projects and deadlines.



Excellent written and verbal communication skills.



To Apply:

Please submit your resume along with a portfolio showcasing your video editing and graphic design work. In your cover letter, please specify your experience with Canva and AI tools, Video and Photo editing software and designs.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Reels/TikTok) — High Volume, Performance-Based
description:
We’re looking for a fast, detail-oriented video editor to join our team.



This is not a cinematic editing role.

This is about creating high-performing short-form content (Instagram Reels / TikTok) at scale.



What You’ll Do



* Turn raw footage into multiple short-form videos

* Find the best 
nts (hooks) in longer clips

* Add captions, cuts, and simple effects

* Repurpose 1 video into multiple pieces of content

* Schedule posts using tools like Later or Metricool

* Organize files in Google Drive



What We’re Looking For



* Experience editing short-form content (Reels/TikTok)

* Understands hooks, pacing, and retention

* Can produce multiple videos from the same footage

* Fast turnaround and consistent output

* Good English communication

* Reliable and organized



Important

We care more about:



* Your ability to pick viral 
nts

* Your ability to create multiple outputs



Than:



* Advanced effects or cinematic editing



Test Task (Required)

If shortlisted, you will receive:



* 3 raw video clips (1 minute each)



Your task:



* Create 5 short-form videos total

* Use different hooks/angles where possible

* Add captions



This helps us understand how you think and edit.



To Apply

Please include:



1. Links to your best short-form edits

2. A short answer:

"How do you d
 what makes a good hook?"

3. Your availability (hours per week)



We are building a long-term team, so if you perform well, this can turn into a stable, ongoing role with more responsibility.



Looking forward to working with you.

The scope requires high attention to detail, superior analytical skills, patience with a lot of manual processing while mastering systems used in purchasing activity. Great communication skills, FLUENT ENGLISH and follow-through to ensure transactions are done on time, accurately and in line with divisional standards.

title: Creative Strategist (Meta Ads / UGC)
description:
Creative Strategist (Meta Ads & UGC)



We’re hiring a Creative Strategist (Meta Ads & UGC)  to help us scale our paid creative output for one of our ecommerce brands.



This role sits between creative strategy and execution. You will research winning ad concepts, identify ideas worth testing for our brand, adapt and write scripts, prepare voiceover and soundtrack drafts, create clear briefs for editors, and coordinate creator content production.



We’re looking for someone with strong creative taste, Meta ad understanding, good written English, and solid execution skills.



What You’ll Own



1. Creative Research & Strategy Support



You will research competitor and adjacent-brand ads, identify concepts and scripts that could work for our brand, and help build a clear pipeline of ideas worth testing. You should be able to recognize strong hooks, understand what makes an ad compelling, and think in terms of “same but different” rather than just copying what already exists.



2. Script Development



You will adapt winning concepts to our brand, write new scripts when needed, and create multiple hook variations for each concept. You should understand how to write for paid social, especially Meta, and know the difference between writing something that sounds good and writing something that is designed to convert.



3. Creative Assembly & Briefing



You will generate voiceovers, pair them with music, and assemble rough audio drafts that can be used for production. You will also turn concepts into clear, structured Notion briefs for editors, including line-by-line shot guidance, references, and relevant asset links. You should have enough editing sense to understand rhythm, pacing, and how a creative should come together.



4. Creator Coordination



You will help source creators for content batches following our SOPs, support outreach and follow-up, keep communication organized, and make sure deliverables are collected and stored properly. You should be comfortable coordinating moving parts, tracking progress, and helping maintain a reliable flow of fresh creator content.



Expected Deliverables :



The role is designed to support a consistent paid creative testing pipeline by following SOPs. The expected output includes:



- Consistent production of new video briefs (8 per month to start)

- Script development, voiceover generation, ongoing research

- 1 creator batch every 1–2 months, typically around 5 creators

- Creative Strategy research



What We’re Looking For



You are likely a strong fit if you have experience working on Meta creatives for ecommerce brands and understand how paid social ads are structured to perform.



You should have:



- Experience with Meta /
 ad creatives

- strong understanding of hooks, angles, and direct-response creative

- good written English

- the ability to identify winning concepts and adapt them to a brand

- basic to strong editing skills

- Experience in following SOPs

- a good sense of rhythm, pacing, and creative flow

- strong organization and attention to detail

- the ability to turn ideas into clean, actionable briefs

- experience in DTC / ecommerce



Nice to Have



experience using DaVinci Resolve

experience with 11Labs or other voiceover tools

experience working with UGC creators / influencer coordination

experience building briefs in Notion



Payment



This role will start part-time (4 days a week, Monday to Thursday) moving toward full-time.

Compensation will depend on experience and proof of past results, but our initial target range is to start around $8/hour - $1024/month to start, with room to grow for the right person as results and responsibilities expand.



How to Apply



Please include:

a short note on your experience with Meta ad creatives

examples of ecommerce creative work you’ve been involved in

any relevant scriptwriting, creative strategy, editing, or briefing experience

tools you’ve used (for example: DaVinci, 11Labs, Notion, etc.)



BrandJet I Propelling Brands into Space

brandjet.eu

title: Detail-Oriented Social Media Manager + GoHighLevel + Graphic Design
description:
Job Title: Detail-oriented Social Media Guru + GoHighLevel + Graphic Designer



Company: Connect My Church



Location: Remote (Philippines)



Job Type: Full-Time



Pay: Starts at $450/month raised to $500 after the first two months. Future raises available based on performance, loyalty, and growth



Connect My Church is hiring a full-time Detail-oriented Social Media Guru + GoHighLevel + Graphic Designer to join our growing team.



We serve local churches and major Christian brands with large followings. Our team supports work involving social media, graphic design, websites, funnels, apps, AI tools, digital systems, and church software. This role will support multiple brands and projects while helping us create excellent content that serves churches and Christian audiences well.



This is not a simple content posting job. We are looking for someone who can think, create, solve problems, learn quickly, and produce high-quality work consistently. This role also includes helping support the promotion and sales efforts of our church software, so we want someone who is comfortable contributing to both creative and marketing-driven work.



What You’ll Do



* Manage social media accounts across multiple brands

* Help launch and grow new social media accounts from scratch

* Create, schedule, and publish content

* Grow followers and improve engagement

* Design thumbnails, covers, graphics, and branded content

* Use AI tools heavily in daily work

* Support multiple projects across our team

* Help improve workflows, systems, and content processes

* Help support the promotion and sales efforts of our church software

* Assist with promotional content, launch materials, and campaign support related to our software

* Help our team create content that supports marketing, audience growth, and sales initiatives

* Help support GoHighLevel-related tasks, campaigns, funnels, pages, and systems as needed

* Work with submitted video clips using simple editing and repurposing tools when needed



Platforms You Should Know



*

* Instagram

* TikTok

* YouTube



Required Skills



* Strong understanding of social media

* Strong Canva skills

* Excellent graphic design skills

* Strong written and spoken English

* Attention to detail

* Strong work ethic

* Ability to work independently

* Problem-solving ability

* Willingness to learn quickly

* Comfort using AI tools regularly in your workflow

* Comfort helping create content that supports marketing and sales goals

* Solid GoHighLevel knowledge or strong familiarity with the platform

* Confidence working inside GoHighLevel for marketing, content, funnel, or support tasks



Big Pluses



* GoHighLevel expert certification

* Strong GoHighLevel experience

* WordPress experience

* Funnel builder or site builder experience

* Adobe Creative Suite familiarity

* Basic SEO knowledge for YouTube, TikTok, and social content

* Experience growing social media accounts

* Experience managing multiple brands or projects

* Familiarity with software promotion, launches, or sales support content

* Basic video editing skills

* Familiarity with video editing tools like Adobe Premiere Pro



Work Expectations



* This is a full-time remote role

* You may set your own work hours

* Time tracking software is required and non-negotiable

* Admin will monitor time

* We are not micromanagers, but we do expect honest, productive work during paid hours



Training



We can train the right person on:



* Opus Clip / Opus Pro

* Internal workflows

* Team systems

* Certain content and marketing processes

* The simple video editing tasks needed for this role



You do not need to be an advanced video editor for this position. We primarily use Opus Pro, and most clips will be submitted in a way that requires very little editing. We can easily train the small amount of video editing this role requires.



You do not need to know everything already, but you do need to be sharp, dependable, teachable, and serious about quality.



Who We’re Looking For



* Smart

* Creative

* Hardworking

* Dependable

* Teachable

* Detail-oriented

* Comfortable learning new tools

* Able to take ownership of their work

* Serious about doing excellent work



If you need constant reminders, constant supervision, or someone checking on you all day, this role is probably not the right fit.



To Apply



Please send:



* Your resume

* Your portfolio or work samples

* Examples of graphics you’ve created

* Examples of social media accounts you’ve helped manage or grow

* Examples of any GoHighLevel work you’ve done, if applicable



Also answer these questions in your application:



* Which social media platform do you understand best, and why?

* Which AI tools do you use regularly?

* What is your level of experience with GoHighLevel?

* Do you have a GoHighLevel certification? If so, which one?

* Which design tools do you know how to use?

* Have you helped grow a social media account before? Briefly explain.

* Have you ever helped support the promotion or sales of a product or software? Briefly explain.

* Why are you a strong fit for this role?

* What is one time you had to figure something out on your own?

* Are you a person of faith? Do you have a favorite Bible verse? This is NOT required to work for our company, but you must be comfortable primarily serving Christian organization clients and producing Christian content.



To show attention to detail, follow these instructions exactly:



* Put Application for Detail-oriented Social Media Guru + GoHighLevel + Graphic Designer - [Your Full Name] at the top of your message

* On the second line, type this exact phrase: Excellence matters in small things

* Use the word blueprint naturally in one sentence

* Include exactly 2 work samples you are most proud of

* End your message with this exact sentence: Hours tracked honestly. Work done with excellence.

* Do not use bullet points in your application message



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



We are looking for someone who wants to do meaningful work and help us serve churches and major Christian brands with excellence.



If that sounds like you, apply for a spot on this winning team!

title: Nonprofit Grant Writer & Proposal Assistant
description:
I’m looking for a part-time Nonprofit Grant Writer & Proposal Assistant to support grant writing and proposal development for my nonprofit clients.



This role is ideal for someone who is strong in grant writing, proposal development, and written communication, and who can also support related tasks such as reviewing guidelines, drafting reports, adapting content for different funders, and keeping proposal materials organized and on track.



The primary focus of this role is helping move grant applications forward from outline to draft to submission support. I’m looking for someone who can work independently with background materials, previous proposals, funder guidelines, and strategic direction, without needing step-by-step instruction for every task.



About the Business

I run a fundraising consulting business that supports nonprofit organizations with strategy, campaigns, and systems. A key part of my work includes helping clients develop strong grant applications and manage the writing process in a clear, organized, and professional way.



I’m looking for someone who can support that work with strong writing, editing, attention to detail, and a willingness to work within established systems and workflows.



What You’ll Be Doing



 - Review funder guidelines and summarize key application requirements, questions, and deadlines

 - Draft grant proposals, letters of inquiry, reports, and other funder-facing content using source materials I provide

 - Adapt existing content for different funders and application formats

 - Pull key information from client documents, websites, reports, previous proposals, and approved source materials

 - Help organize proposal materials, supporting documents, and standard content

 - Maintain grant trackers, calendars, and application status updates

 - Edit and revise draft content based on feedback

 - Flag missing information, inconsistencies, or questions before submission

 - Support a clear and organized workflow across multiple deadlines and client projects



What Matters Most

Strong writing and editing skills are the most important requirements for this role.



A key aspect of our process is working within an AI-supported writing workflow. Our process uses AI in the preliminary drafting stage, followed by human review, refinement, and adaptation. I’m looking for someone who can use AI efficiently to support early drafts, then apply strong judgment, editing skills, and attention to detail to ensure the final writing is accurate, clear, funder-aligned, and reflective of the client’s voice, program focus, and approved source materials.



Strong written English is essential. Attention to detail is also very important, especially when working across different deadlines, applications, and supporting documents.



Experience with nonprofit grant writing, proposal support, or donor communications is a strong asset.



This Role Is a Good Fit If You:



 - Are confident in your writing, editing, and proofreading skills

 - Can review funder guidelines and pull out the most important details

 - Are comfortable turning background information into strong draft content

 - Can adapt writing for different funders, formats, and audiences

 - Are comfortable using AI as part of a structured writing process

 - Need minimal direction once you understand the goals and workflow

 - Are highly organized and able to manage details across multiple projects

 - Are comfortable working within project management systems like ClickUp and following established workflow templates

 - Catch small mistakes, inconsistencies, and missing pieces before submitting work

 - Communicate clearly and ask thoughtful questions when needed

 - Are interested in a longer-term working relationship



Qualities Needed to Succeed



Integrity

You communicate honestly, take responsibility for your work, and let me know if something is unclear or delayed.



Commitment

I’m looking for someone interested in building a longer-term working relationship, not just completing one quick task.



Desire to Learn

I value someone who is open to feedback, willing to improve, and interested in growing with the role over time.



Attention to Detail

You notice inconsistencies, missing information, formatting issues, and small mistakes before work is submitted.



Good Judgment

You know how to use AI as a support tool, not a substitute for thinking. You review outputs carefully, verify details, and make sure the final work is accurate and appropriate for the client and funder.



About the Role

This is a part-time role to start, with potential to grow over time depending on fit, workflow, and evolving needs.



This role may involve supporting multiple nonprofit clients and projects at the same time, so strong organization and comfort switching between priorities will be important.



To Apply

Use cccVA02 in your subject line. Please begin the first line of your
 application with the words east coast grant.



Please also include:



 - A short note about your experience with grant writing, proposal development, or proposal support

 - One or two writing samples related to grants, proposals, reports, or nonprofit writing

 - A brief note explaining your role in each sample

 - A short description of your process for turning source material into a strong draft

 - A note about your experience using AI to support writing, editing, or proposal development



This is a part-time role to start, with an estimated workload of approximately 15 hours per week. Hours may vary slightly depending on active deadlines and client needs. There is potential for this role to grow over time depending on fit, workflow, and evolving needs.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
You'll work directly with our Creative Director to produce design assets that keep our brand consistent and beautiful across every touchpoint. This is a part-time, ongoing role — not a one-off project. We're looking for someone who wants to become part of our team.



What You'll Be Designing

•  Social media graphics (Instagram posts, Stories,
 covers, Pinterest pins)

•  Course workbook layouts

•  Print Pieces (event flyers, business cards, banners, booth displays, PDF’s)

• 
 header graphics and visual templates

•  Presentation slides

•  Marketing collateral (landing page mockups, ad graphics, QR code materials)

•  Occasional brand asset updates (icons, patterns, dividers)



Typical Week

•  Receive 5-10 design briefs via Google Chat or project management tool

•  Produce first drafts within 24 hours (longer for bigger projects)

•  1-2 rounds of revisions based on feedback

•  Export print-ready files (300 DPI, correct bleed/margins) when needed

•  Communicate with our Design Director (either call/written) for edits and projects.



Must Have

• 3+ years of graphic design experience

• Strong Adobe InDesign, Photoshop, or Illustrator Skills (or other design tool such as ProCreate)

• Ability to take a brand style guide and apply it consistently without hand-holding

• Experience creating print-ready files (understanding of DPI, bleed, safe zones)

• Strong eye for layout, typography, and whitespace

• Reliable internet connection with backup option

• Excellent English communication (written and verbal)

• Available for 15-20 hours per week

• Minimum 2-3 hours daily overlap with US Mountain Time (UTC-7)



Nice to Have

•  Experience with Canva

•  Experience with health, wellness, or coaching brands

•  Experience setting up Canva Brand Kits from scratch (not just using them)

•  Basic understanding of
 design



How to Apply

1.  Your design portfolio — a link to your website, Behance, or a Google Drive folder with 5-10 recent pieces. We want to see multi-piece brand work (not only random one-offs). Print work is a plus.

2.  A short note (3-5 sentences) answering this question: "Look at our website (
) and tell us: what's one thing you'd keep about the design, and one thing you'd improve?"

3.  Your availability — which hours of the day (in Philippine time) can you overlap with US Mountain Time (7 AM - 5 PM MT)?



Interview Process

1.  Portfolio review (we'll reach out within 48 hours if your work fits)

2.  20-minute video call with our Creative Director

3.  Paid test task ($15 USD) — create 2 branded social media graphics using our style guide

4.  30-day trial period at agreed rate

We're excited to find someone who cares about craft and wants to grow with us. If you love making things look beautiful and you're reliable, we want to hear from you.

title: Senior Video Editor [ Pacific Standard Time ]
description:
Application Requirements:

1. Use at least 10AP for your application.

2. Include "Senior Video Editor Pro" in your subject line.



Note: Applications missing either requirement will not be considered.

_________________________________________________________



About Veritas Vans

Veritas Vans builds the most trusted accessories for Starlink Mini and Starlink Standard. Our mission is to give people the freedom to work, explore, and stay connected anywhere. From Baja coastlines to deep forest trails, our customers rely on our gear for capability, protection, and unlimited connection.



Your role is to help visually tell this story across all platforms.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Senior Video Editor who can own our long-form YouTube content, high-retention short-form content, and graphic design needs. You must be highly experienced, creative, fast, and able to work autonomously within a growing brand.



Responsibilities



Video Editing – Long Form

- Edit 6–15 minute YouTube videos with strong retention, pacing, and narrative clarity.

- Add b-roll, overlays, captions, music, and brand-consistent graphics.

- Build engaging openings with proven YouTube hook methods.



Video Editing – Short Form

- Execute the Hook ? Retain ? Reward method for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts.

- Add dynamic subtitles, zooms, cuts, 
 inserts, and pacing adjustments.

- Produce scroll-stopping, high-retention content.



Graphic Design & Photo Editing

- Create YouTube thumbnails and graphic assets.

- Design text treatments, overlays, and promotional visuals.

- Edit lifestyle and product photos for multi-platform use.



Brand Storytelling

- Align all edits with our brand themes: freedom, connection, capability, control.

- Contribute creative ideas and concepts for future video content.



AI-Driven Editing & Workflow Optimization

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, Topaz, Descript, etc.) as a core part of your editing workflow.

- Generate high-performing hooks, captions, and on-screen text callouts using AI.

- Use AI to research and improve storytelling, pacing, and content structure.

- Continuously explore and implement new AI workflows to improve output quality, speed, and efficiency.

- Leverage AI to enhance both creative output and production throughput, not just assist basic tasks.



Cross-Platform Optimization

- Edit in multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 4:5, 1:1.

- Prepare final deliverables in organized, structured folders.

- Optimize content for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok,
.



Collaboration

- Work closely with the content team and leadership.

- Follow SOPs and meet deadlines consistently.

- Join scheduled calls proactively (no reminders required)

- Be punctual and prepared for feedback sessions



Work Discipline & Delivery Standards

- Be actively available and responsive during working hours (PST schedule).

- Address tasks, revisions, and team communication within working hours.

- Meet deadlines consistently and communicate early if delays occur.

- Submit deliverables early in the workday whenever possible to allow time for review and revisions.



Quality & Output Standards

- Deliver edits that are near publish-ready on first submission.

- Ensure drafts require minimal revisions and are not incomplete or partially executed.

- Perform a full self-review before submission to ensure:

- all feedback is applied

- no new issues are introduced

- output meets brand and quality standards

- Maintain consistently high production quality across all deliverables.



Note:

Include the phrase “Senior Video Editor Pro” in your subject line. Applications missing this phrase will not be considered. Use at least 5AP for your application.



Required Skills



- Ability to work graveyard shift (PST hours)

- 3–5+ years professional video editing experience

- Expert in Adobe Premiere Pro

- Strong skills in After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator, or Figma

- Proven experience editing YouTube content and high-performing short-form videos

- Strong understanding of retention, pacing, story structure, and attention engineering

- Experience creating high-converting thumbnails

- Strong understanding of modern content trends across YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok

- Ability to edit lifestyle, outdoor, product, and UGC-style content



AI & Workflow Skills (Required)

- Strong proficiency in using AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, etc.) within editing workflows

- Ability to generate hooks, captions, and on-screen text using AI

- Experience using AI to improve storytelling, pacing, and video performance

- Ability to research and implement new AI workflows to improve efficiency and output quality



Work Ethic & Discipline

- Highly reliable, responsive, and accountable

- Strong attention to detail and ability to self-review work

- Ability to follow feedback precisely and minimize repeated revisions



Bonus Experience

- Motion graphics or animation skills.

- Experience in e-commerce, outdoor brands, or creator channels.

- Understanding of YouTube SEO (titles, thumbnails, keywords).

- Ability to generate ideas for hooks, storylines, and visual treatments.



What We Offer

- Long-term employment with growth potential.

- Competitive salary based on experience.

- Consistent weekly workload.

- Direct impact on a fast-scaling global brand.

- Creative freedom and an opportunity to lead our video direction.



How to Apply



Submit the following:

- Resume

- Short explanation of why you’re the right fit

- Brief explanation of how you use AI in your editing workflow

- 1 example where you improved video performance (retention, CTR, etc.)

- Portfolio of your best long-form and short-form edits

- Links to YouTube channels or brands you’ve edited for



Learn About Us:









Website:

title: Full-Time Podcast Manager
description:
Job Title: Full-Time Podcast and Social Media Manager



Company Overview:

We are a fast-growing agency that empowers entrepreneurs to achieve their goals and enhance their visibility through impactful content creation. Our mission includes producing and managing high-quality podcast content and leveraging social media strategies to engage audiences, build brand authority, and drive growth.



Position Overview:

We are seeking an experienced Podcast and Social Media Manager to oversee and manage multiple podcasts while driving social media marketing efforts. The ideal candidate will have a proven track record in podcast production, social media management, guest coordination, and content promotion. This is a full-time role that requires excellent organizational skills, creativity, and the ability to handle the unique needs of various clients.



Key Responsibilities:



Podcast Management:

• Manage all aspects of podcast production for multiple shows, ensuring timely and high-quality delivery.

• Coordinate guest interviews, including outreach, scheduling, and preparing guests for their appearances.

• Develop and manage production schedules, ensuring deadlines are consistently met.

• Create and oversee workflows to streamline podcast operations and optimize efficiency.

• Collaborate with editors and content creators to produce engaging audio and video content.

• Write and edit show notes, titles, and descriptions for each episode.

• Distribute episodes across podcast platforms (e.g., Spotify, Apple Podcasts) and track performance metrics.

• Monitor analytics and provide clients with regular reports on podcast performance.

• Stay updated on podcasting trends, tools, and industry best practices to ensure competitive positioning.



Social Media Management:

• Develop and execute social media strategies to promote podcast episodes and other related content.

• Create and schedule posts on platforms like Instagram, LinkedIn,
, TikTok, and
.

• Edit and repurpose podcast content into engaging social media clips and graphics.

• Use tools like CapCut, Canva, or Descript to optimize and streamline social media content creation.

• Engage with followers, respond to comments, and foster online communities around podcast brands.

• Monitor social media analytics to measure campaign performance and optimize strategies for better engagement and reach.



Additional Responsibilities:

• Coordinate with marketing teams to align podcast and social media strategies with broader client goals.

• Assist in advertising and sponsorship outreach for podcast monetization opportunities.

• Conduct market and competition analysis to identify trends and new opportunities in podcasting and social media.



Qualifications:

• Proven experience managing multiple podcasts or similar content projects.

• Strong understanding of podcast platforms, workflows, and best practices.

• Solid experience in social media management and marketing, including analytics and campaign optimization.

• Familiarity with social media platforms and tools such as Hootsuite, Buffer, or Sprout Social.

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills for guest coordination and audience engagement.

• Proficiency in podcast editing software (e.g., Audacity, Adobe Audition) and social media content creation tools.

• Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment while maintaining high attention to detail.



Preferred Qualifications:

• Experience with video podcasting and SEO optimization for podcast episodes and promotional materials.

• Knowledge of automation tools like Zapier and CRM platforms.

• Familiarity with paid social media advertising strategies.



What We Offer:

• Flexible remote working environment.

• Opportunities for professional growth and development.

• Collaborative and supportive team culture.

• Competitive compensation based on experience



Application Requirements:

To apply for this position, candidates MUST complete all three steps below:

1. Submit a resume outlining your experience.

2. Provide a portfolio showcasing podcasts and social media projects you’ve managed.

3. Submit a link to a newly created video introduction where you:

• State the current date (to verify it’s a new video).

• Explain why you are the perfect fit for this role.

• Highlight relevant projects you’ve completed and your approach to podcast management and social media marketing.

• Showcase examples of your work or workflows if possible.



Please Note:

• Do not apply if you do not complete all three requirements as described above.

• Old video introductions or videos that do not include all required components will NOT be considered.

• Applications submitted directly on other platforms will not be considered.



How to Apply:

Submit your application via this link: 



We are excited to review your application and see how your expertise can elevate our podcast and social media content to new heights!

description:

title: Amazon Fba prodct researcher
description:
Product Researcher (Part-Time, Remote) — Vitamo

We're a growing Amazon FBA brand with a portfolio of supplements, skincare, and haircare products. We're hiring a part-time Product Researcher to start small and grow into a core member of the team over the next few years.

How this starts

3 hours per week. You'll be doing product research — identifying opportunities in our categories using Helium 10, analysing competition, search volume, and revenue potential, and delivering clean, structured outputs we can act on.

If the work is good, hours increase. Fast.

Where it goes

Within a few weeks, the role expands into supplier sourcing — contacting manufacturers in the USA, getting quotes, pushing products from idea to launch-ready. Eventually you'll own the full workflow from spotted opportunity to sourced product, with minimal hand-holding.

This is a ground-floor role with a real growth path for someone who wants to build deep knowledge of how a product brand operates.

What we're looking for



Comfortable working independently and taking initiative — you don't wait to be told what to do next

Organised and precise with data — outputs need to be clean, not approximate

Confident on the phone and in written communication with suppliers

Familiar with Helium 10 or willing to learn it quickly

Interested in e-commerce and physical products, not just looking for hours



What this is not

This is not a high-volume task role. We're looking for one person who thinks, not someone who fills in a spreadsheet on autopilot. If you find something interesting, we want to hear about it.

Details



Remote, flexible hours

3 hrs/week to start, increasing based on performance

Paid trial project before any commitment on either side



To apply, send a short note on why this interests you and any relevant experience. Please send C.V too and try avoid using AI to apply or at least use one that is good and doesnt sound like all the other applicants

title: Community Growth Specialist — Reddit, Quora & English Forums
description:
We are a proxy service with 20M+ residential IPs, used by digital marketers, affiliate teams, and e-commerce businesses worldwide.



We're looking for someone to grow our brand across English-speaking communities by writing helpful, natural content — NOT ads or spam.



What you'll do:

- Write 20-30 helpful comments/answers per day on Reddit, Quora, and niche forums

- Find relevant threads where people ask about proxies, VPNs, anti-detect browsers, ad accounts, web scraping

- Manage a network of accounts across platforms (we provide the accounts)

- Build reputation and karma on these accounts over time

- Track your work and report weekly (threads, engagement, results)



You're a great fit if:

- Your English writing sounds native — not textbook, not robotic

- You've managed multiple accounts on Reddit, Quora, forums, or social media

- You understand how online communities work (what gets upvoted vs. what gets banned)

- You know the difference between being genuinely helpful and being a shill

- Bonus: you know what residential proxies, anti-detect browsers, or affiliate marketing are



This is NOT a content writing job. You will be a community participant — helping real people and naturally building brand awareness.



Details:

- Full-time (8 hours/day, flexible schedule)

- Long-term (6+ months)

- Salary: $
/month depending on experience

- Start: immediately



To apply: fill out this form —

title: ???? Junior Media Buyer (Performance Marketing) – Remote | Fast-Growing E-Commerce Startup
description:
?? Only apply if you have hands-on experience with paid media platforms (Meta preferred) and understand performance marketing fundamentals such as CPA, ROAS, CTR, and attribution models.



Please apply here: 
 



About Skinnify

At Skinnify (www.skinnify.co), we’re reinventing fitness by integrating resistance into everyday clothing. In just three years, we’ve grown from 0 to 150,000+ customers, and we’re just getting started.

To get a better idea of our company and what it’s like to work on our team, watch this short video:



We are now looking for a Junior Media Buyer to join our performance marketing team and help manage and scale our paid media campaigns.

You will primarily assist with campaigns for our US store, where we invest over $500,000 per month in paid advertising. This is a unique opportunity to gain hands-on experience inside a fast-paced, high-growth e-commerce environment.



???? Your Responsibilities

? Assist in launching and managing paid campaigns across Meta, TikTok, AppLovin, Taboola, and other platforms

? Conduct A/B tests on creatives, audiences, funnels, and bidding strategies

? Support daily performance monitoring and reporting, using Triple Whale as the main source of truth

? Work closely with the creative and design teams to suggest improvements for ad creatives based on performance data

? Assist with basic conversion tracking and pixel setup when needed

? Monitor campaign metrics and identify opportunities to improve CPA, ROAS, and overall campaign efficiency

? Stay up to date with paid media trends, algorithm updates, and best practices



???? What We’re Looking For

?? 1+ year of experience in paid media buying or performance marketing

?? Hands-on experience with at least one major ad platform (Meta preferred)

?? Strong analytical skills and comfort working with campaign data

?? Basic understanding of key performance metrics such as CPA, ROAS, CTR, LTV

?? Familiarity with different attribution models

?? Strong attention to detail and ability to execute tasks quickly

?? Proactive mindset with a strong willingness to learn

?? Fluent in English



???? Compensation & Work Setup

???? $7 USD/hour

?? Hourly-based work with time tracking

???? Must have at least 4 hours overlap with UTC-3 working hours

???? Expected workload: 5–10 hours per week





???? Why Join Skinnify?

???? Remote Work – Work from anywhere in the world

???? High Growth Environment – Join a brand that grew from 0 to 150,000+ customers in 3 years

???? Massive Ad Budgets – Work with campaigns investing $500K+ per month

???? Hands-On Learning – Gain real experience in scaling performance marketing campaigns

???? Work With Experts – Collaborate with experienced media buyers, creatives, and strategists

? Great Team Culture – Check out our employee reviews on Glassdoor:





???????? The Skinnify Story

Growing up, our founder Christian wasn’t the easiest kid.

His mom gave everything to raise him and his siblings - often neglecting her own health in the process. As an adult, Christian wanted to help her become fitter, but she simply didn't have time for the gym.

The solution came during his own workout. While using resistance bands, he thought:

"What if these were built into leggings?"

That idea became our first product: Resistance Band Leggings that turn everyday movement into exercise.

Since then, we've expanded into sleeves, shoes, and more, with the mission of helping busy women become fitter without needing the gym.



???? Skinnify’s Core Values

???? Innovation – We design groundbreaking clothing with built-in resistance.

???? Effectiveness – Our products help people burn more calories and get fitter with every step.

???? Accessibility – Fitness should be possible for everyone, even the busiest people.

???? Fun – Exercise should feel effortless and enjoyable.

? Quality – We build durable, high-quality products that last.



???? Ready to Grow With Us?

If you're passionate about performance marketing and e-commerce, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Performance Video Editor – Meta Ads (DTC Brand, $150K+/mo Ad Spend)
description:
We're a US-based parenting education brand spending $200K+/month on Meta ads. We need a dedicated performance video editor who can produce 30–50+ ad variations per week from existing footage & sourced footage using CapCut.



This is NOT a creative/artistic editing role. This is high-volume, modular ad assembly — swapping hooks, bodies, CTAs, text overlays, and music to create dozens of structurally distinct ad variations from a library of raw footage components.



WHAT YOU'LL DO EVERY WEEK:

— Assemble 30–50+ Meta ad variations from modular footage (hooks, body clips, CTAs, B-roll)

— Add bold, scroll-stopping text overlays optimized for sound-off viewing (85% of Meta views are muted)

— Apply auto-captions with intentional styling (not default dumps)

— Swap hooks, CTAs, music, and pacing across variations

— Export in correct specs (9:16, 1:1, 4:5) with proper safe zones

— Organize and maintain our shared asset library

— Review ad performance data weekly and learn what's working (we share ROAS, CTR, hook rate, hold rate)



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

— 2+ years editing video ads specifically for Meta/Facebook/Instagram (not YouTube, not wedding, not film — META ADS)

— CapCut is your primary tool and you're fast in it

— You understand direct response: hooks, pattern interrupts, pacing, urgency, CTAs

— You can look at raw footage and see 10+ variations without being told

— You've worked with DTC or e-commerce brands before

— You understand that "ugly" authentic-looking ads outperform polished cinematic ads on Meta

— You're comfortable with repetitive, high-volume production work (this is assembly-line speed, not artisan craftsmanship)

— You can work independently from briefs with minimal revision cycles

— Reliable internet, own computer, available during US business hours overlap (at least 4 hours)



BONUS (not required):

— Experience with AI tools (Higgsfield, Kling, ElevenLabs) for lip sync or AI video

— Basic understanding of Meta Ads Manager (reading performance metrics)

— Experience adding film grain, compression artifacts, ambient audio to make ads feel organic



WHAT WE PROVIDE:

— Full organized asset library (hooks, bodies, CTAs, overlays all pre-sorted)

— Loom-based SOPs for every ad format we run

— Weekly performance data so you see which of YOUR edits are winning

— Reference ads and creative briefs for every batch

— Clear, fast feedback (no 5-day review cycles)

— Long-term role with growth path — editors who develop performance intuition get promoted to lead creative roles



HOW TO APPLY:

Do NOT just send your resume. To be considered, you MUST include:



1. A link to 3–5 Meta/Facebook/Instagram video ads you personally edited (not YouTube content, not reels for organic — PAID ADS). If they're in a portfolio, timestamp or label which ones are yours.



2. Answer this question in 2–3 sentences: "If an ad has a 50% hook rate but viewers drop off at the 5-second mark, what would you change in the edit?"



3. Your honest self-rating 1–10 on CapCut speed and proficiency.



4. Which brands have you worked with before in which role and at which ad spend levels?



Applications without all 3 items will be ignored. We review applications within 48 hours and top candidates will receive a PAID test task ($50 USD) using real footage from our brand.



This is a sensitive product category (child safety education) — the content is empowering and positive, not graphic. You should be comfortable editing content about keeping kids safe.
